paragraphs.en: I love animals. My favourite animal is a cat.
paragraphs.zh: 我喜欢动物。我最喜欢的动物是猫。

paragraphs.en: My cat is small and grey. She has big green eyes.
paragraphs.zh: 我的猫又小又灰。她有一双大大的绿色眼睛。

paragraphs.en: My friend has a dog. The dog is brown and very happy.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友有一只狗。这只狗是棕色的，非常开心。

paragraphs.en: At the zoo, I can see a bear, a crocodile and a monkey.
paragraphs.zh: 在动物园里，我能看到一只熊、一条鳄鱼和一只猴子。

paragraphs.en: The elephant is very big. The mouse is very small.
paragraphs.zh: 大象非常大。老鼠非常小。

paragraphs.en: Birds can fly in the sky. Fish can swim in the water.
paragraphs.zh: 鸟能在天空中飞。鱼能在水里游。

paragraphs.en: On the farm, there are chickens, cows and horses.
paragraphs.zh: 在农场上，有鸡、牛和马。

paragraphs.en: I want a pet. Maybe a rabbit or a turtle!
paragraphs.zh: 我想要一只宠物。也许是一只兔子或一只乌龟！

paragraphs.en: This is my family. I live with my mum and dad.
paragraphs.zh: 这是我的家人。我和妈妈爸爸住在一起。

paragraphs.en: I have one brother and one sister. My brother is older than me.
paragraphs.zh: 我有一个哥哥和一个妹妹。我哥哥比我大。

paragraphs.en: My grandmother and grandfather live near our house.
paragraphs.zh: 我的奶奶和爷爷住在我们家附近。

paragraphs.en: My uncle and aunt come to visit us every weekend.
paragraphs.zh: 我的叔叔和阿姨每个周末都来看我们。

paragraphs.en: I have three cousins. We like to play together.
paragraphs.zh: 我有三个表兄妹。我们喜欢一起玩。

paragraphs.en: My best friend is Tom. He is my classmate at school.
paragraphs.zh: 我最好的朋友是汤姆。他是我的同学。

paragraphs.en: Our family is not very big, but we are very happy.
paragraphs.zh: 我们家不是很大，但我们很幸福。

paragraphs.en: For breakfast, I eat bread and drink milk.
paragraphs.zh: 早餐，我吃面包喝牛奶。

paragraphs.en: Sometimes I have an egg and some juice too.
paragraphs.zh: 有时候我还吃一个鸡蛋，喝一些果汁。

paragraphs.en: For lunch, I like rice with chicken or fish.
paragraphs.zh: 午餐，我喜欢吃米饭配鸡肉或鱼。

paragraphs.en: I love fruit. Apples and bananas are my favourite.
paragraphs.zh: 我喜欢水果。苹果和香蕉是我最喜欢的。

paragraphs.en: For dinner, my mum makes pasta or a burger.
paragraphs.zh: 晚餐，妈妈做意面或汉堡。

paragraphs.en: I like cake and candy, but mum says not too much!
paragraphs.zh: 我喜欢蛋糕和糖果，但妈妈说不能吃太多！

paragraphs.en: We always drink water. Water is good for you.
paragraphs.zh: 我们总是喝水。水对你有好处。

paragraphs.en: On my birthday, we eat pizza and ice cream!
paragraphs.zh: 在我生日那天，我们吃比萨和冰淇淋！

paragraphs.en: We live in a big apartment. It has five rooms.
paragraphs.zh: 我们住在一个大公寓里。它有五个房间。

paragraphs.en: My bedroom has a bed, a desk and a bookcase.
paragraphs.zh: 我的卧室有一张床、一张书桌和一个书架。

paragraphs.en: In the living room, there is a sofa and a television.
paragraphs.zh: 客厅里有一张沙发和一台电视。

paragraphs.en: The kitchen has a table and four chairs.
paragraphs.zh: 厨房里有一张桌子和四把椅子。

paragraphs.en: My bathroom has a bath and a mirror.
paragraphs.zh: 我的浴室有一个浴缸和一面镜子。

paragraphs.en: I do my homework at my desk. I use my computer.
paragraphs.zh: 我在书桌前做作业。我用我的电脑。

paragraphs.en: There is a clock on the wall and a lamp on the table.
paragraphs.zh: 墙上有一个钟，桌上有一盏灯。

paragraphs.en: I love my room. It is my favourite place in the house.
paragraphs.zh: 我喜欢我的房间。它是家里我最喜欢的地方。

paragraphs.en: Today I need to get dressed for school.
paragraphs.zh: 今天我需要穿好衣服去上学。

paragraphs.en: I put on my white shirt and blue trousers.
paragraphs.zh: 我穿上白色衬衫和蓝色裤子。

paragraphs.en: Then I put on my shoes and my jacket.
paragraphs.zh: 然后我穿上鞋子和夹克。

paragraphs.en: My hat is red and my bag is black.
paragraphs.zh: 我的帽子是红色的，书包是黑色的。

paragraphs.en: My sister wears a pink dress and white boots.
paragraphs.zh: 我妹妹穿着粉色连衣裙和白色靴子。

paragraphs.en: In winter, I wear a warm coat and a scarf.
paragraphs.zh: 冬天，我穿暖和的外套，戴围巾。

paragraphs.en: My favourite colour is green. What is yours?
paragraphs.zh: 我最喜欢的颜色是绿色。你的呢？

articles.title: My Body
topics: The body & the face（身体与面部）

paragraphs.en: I have two eyes, one nose and one mouth.
paragraphs.zh: 我有两只眼睛、一个鼻子和一张嘴。

paragraphs.en: My hair is black and short.
paragraphs.zh: 我的头发又黑又短。

paragraphs.en: I have two ears. I can hear music with my ears.
paragraphs.zh: 我有两只耳朵。我能用耳朵听音乐。

paragraphs.en: I use my hands to write and my legs to run.
paragraphs.zh: 我用手写字，用腿跑步。

paragraphs.en: My feet are small. I need new shoes!
paragraphs.zh: 我的脚很小。我需要新鞋子！

paragraphs.en: I have two arms. I can carry my bag with my arms.
paragraphs.zh: 我有两只胳膊。我能用胳膊提书包。

paragraphs.en: My face is round. I have a big smile.
paragraphs.zh: 我的脸是圆的。我有一个大大的微笑。

paragraphs.en: I live in a small town. There are many places to go.
paragraphs.zh: 我住在一个小镇上。有很多地方可以去。

paragraphs.en: The bookshop is next to the park.
paragraphs.zh: 书店在公园旁边。

paragraphs.en: The school is between the library and the hospital.
paragraphs.zh: 学校在图书馆和医院之间。

paragraphs.en: Go straight and turn left. The shop is at the end of the street.
paragraphs.zh: 直走然后左转。商店在街道尽头。

paragraphs.en: My house is behind the supermarket.
paragraphs.zh: 我家在超市后面。

paragraphs.en: The playground is in front of the school.
paragraphs.zh: 操场在学校前面。

paragraphs.en: I walk to school every day. It is not far from here.
paragraphs.zh: 我每天走路去上学。离这里不远。

articles.title: A Trip to the Wildlife Park

paragraphs.en: Last weekend, my family went to the wildlife park.
paragraphs.zh: 上周末，我的家人去了野生动物园。

paragraphs.en: We saw dolphins jumping out of the water. They were amazing!
paragraphs.zh: 我们看到海豚从水中跳出来。它们太棒了！

paragraphs.en: There was a lion sleeping under a big tree.
paragraphs.zh: 有一只狮子在一棵大树下睡觉。

paragraphs.en: The kangaroo was jumping very fast with her baby.
paragraphs.zh: 袋鼠带着她的宝宝跳得很快。

paragraphs.en: We walked through the jungle area and saw a parrot.
paragraphs.zh: 我们穿过丛林区域，看到了一只鹦鹉。

paragraphs.en: My little sister was afraid of the snake, but I thought it was cool.
paragraphs.zh: 我妹妹害怕蛇，但我觉得它很酷。

paragraphs.en: The bat only comes out at night. We saw it in a dark room.
paragraphs.zh: 蝙蝠只在晚上出来。我们在一个黑暗的房间里看到了它。

paragraphs.en: I want to go back again because there are more animals to see.
paragraphs.zh: 我想再去一次，因为还有更多动物可以看。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday I did not feel well. I had a bad cold and a cough.
paragraphs.zh: 昨天我感觉不舒服。我得了重感冒，还咳嗽。

paragraphs.en: My mum took me to see the doctor.
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈带我去看医生。

paragraphs.en: The doctor looked at my throat and checked my temperature.
paragraphs.zh: 医生看了我的喉咙，量了体温。

paragraphs.en: She said I should stay in bed and drink lots of water.
paragraphs.zh: 她说我应该卧床休息，多喝水。

paragraphs.en: She gave me some medicine to take three times a day.
paragraphs.zh: 她给了我一些药，一天吃三次。

paragraphs.en: I also had a toothache, so I need to visit the dentist next week.
paragraphs.zh: 我还牙疼，所以下周需要去看牙医。

paragraphs.en: My friend fell down and hurt his arm. He had to go to hospital.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友摔倒了，伤了胳膊。他不得不去医院。

paragraphs.en: Now I feel much better. I can go back to school tomorrow.
paragraphs.zh: 现在我感觉好多了。明天可以回学校了。

paragraphs.en: I am new in this city and I need to find the bus station.
paragraphs.zh: 我刚到这个城市，需要找到公交车站。

paragraphs.en: I asked a woman for directions. She was very helpful.
paragraphs.zh: 我向一位女士问路。她非常热心。

paragraphs.en: She said: Go along this road, past the car park.
paragraphs.zh: 她说：沿着这条路走，经过停车场。

paragraphs.en: Turn right at the corner. The bus stop is opposite the library.
paragraphs.zh: 在拐角处右转。公交站在图书馆对面。

paragraphs.en: The centre of the city has many tall buildings.
paragraphs.zh: 市中心有很多高楼。

paragraphs.en: Above the shop, there is a flat. Below the flat, there is a restaurant.
paragraphs.zh: 商店上面有一间公寓。公寓下面有一家餐厅。

paragraphs.en: I finally found the bus station. It was near the train station.
paragraphs.zh: 我终于找到了公交车站。它在火车站附近。

paragraphs.en: Next time, I will use a map on my phone!
paragraphs.zh: 下次，我会用手机上的地图！

paragraphs.en: Every Saturday, I cook with my grandma.
paragraphs.zh: 每个星期六，我和奶奶一起做饭。

paragraphs.en: Today we are making a cake. We need a bowl, some flour and sugar.
paragraphs.zh: 今天我们做蛋糕。我们需要一个碗、一些面粉和糖。

paragraphs.en: First, we put butter and sugar in the bowl and mix them.
paragraphs.zh: 首先，我们把黄油和糖放进碗里搅拌。

paragraphs.en: Then we add the eggs and some milk.
paragraphs.zh: 然后我们加入鸡蛋和一些牛奶。

paragraphs.en: Grandma makes the best coffee. She drinks it from a big cup.
paragraphs.zh: 奶奶泡的咖啡最好喝。她用一个大杯子喝。

paragraphs.en: I am hungry, so I eat some cheese and bread while we wait.
paragraphs.zh: 我饿了，所以在等待的时候吃了一些奶酪和面包。

paragraphs.en: The cake is ready! It looks beautiful. We put it on a plate.
paragraphs.zh: 蛋糕做好了！看起来很漂亮。我们把它放在盘子里。

paragraphs.en: I love cooking because you can make something delicious.
paragraphs.zh: 我喜欢做饭，因为你可以做出美味的东西。

paragraphs.en: We moved to a new house last month. It has a balcony!
paragraphs.zh: 我们上个月搬到了新房子。它有一个阳台！

paragraphs.en: The house has two floors. Downstairs there is a big kitchen.
paragraphs.zh: 房子有两层。楼下有一个大厨房。

paragraphs.en: We take the lift to go upstairs. My bedroom is on the second floor.
paragraphs.zh: 我们坐电梯上楼。我的卧室在二楼。

paragraphs.en: I can see the roof of the next building from my window.
paragraphs.zh: 从我的窗户可以看到隔壁楼的屋顶。

paragraphs.en: There is a shower in the bathroom and a seat by the window.
paragraphs.zh: 浴室里有一个淋浴，窗边有一个座位。

paragraphs.en: My mum put a blanket on my bed. It is very warm.
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈在我床上放了一条毯子。非常暖和。

paragraphs.en: I had a dream last night about our old house. I miss it a little.
paragraphs.zh: 昨晚我梦到了我们的老房子。我有点想念它。

paragraphs.en: But this new home is great. I sent a message to my friend about it.
paragraphs.zh: 但这个新家很棒。我给朋友发了一条消息。

articles.title: Sports Day at School
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）
The body & the face（身体与面部）

paragraphs.en: Today is Sports Day at school. Everyone is excited.
paragraphs.zh: 今天是学校的运动会。每个人都很兴奋。

paragraphs.en: I always wear my helmet when I ride my bike.
paragraphs.zh: 我骑自行车时总是戴头盔。

paragraphs.en: My friend Charlie has a beard now. He looks much older!
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友查理现在留了胡子。他看起来老多了！

paragraphs.en: The tall boy with curly hair won the race. He ran very fast.
paragraphs.zh: 那个卷发的高个子男孩赢了比赛。他跑得很快。

paragraphs.en: After the race, my neck and back hurt because I ran too hard.
paragraphs.zh: 赛跑后，我的脖子和背疼，因为我跑得太用力了。

paragraphs.en: We walked around the field and watched every game carefully.
paragraphs.zh: 我们绕着操场走，仔细观看每场比赛。

paragraphs.en: The video of the race was very popular online.
paragraphs.zh: 比赛的视频在网上很受欢迎。

paragraphs.en: It was the best day ever. I never want to forget it.
paragraphs.zh: 这是最棒的一天。我永远不想忘记它。

paragraphs.en: My mum and I went shopping for new clothes yesterday.
paragraphs.zh: 昨天我和妈妈去买新衣服了。

paragraphs.en: I need a new coat because winter is coming.
paragraphs.zh: 我需要一件新外套，因为冬天要来了。

paragraphs.en: We also bought a warm sweater and a swimsuit for the holiday.
paragraphs.zh: 我们还买了一件暖和的毛衣和一件泳衣准备度假。

paragraphs.en: My sister wanted a scarf. She chose a red one.
paragraphs.zh: 我妹妹想要一条围巾。她选了一条红色的。

paragraphs.en: The shop was very busy. There were lots of people inside.
paragraphs.zh: 商店很忙。里面有很多人。

paragraphs.en: I tried on both the blue coat and the green one.
paragraphs.zh: 我两件都试了，蓝色的和绿色的。

paragraphs.en: The blue one was better, so I bought it.
paragraphs.zh: 蓝色的更好，所以我买了它。

paragraphs.en: We carried all the bags to the car park.
paragraphs.zh: 我们把所有的袋子提到了停车场。

articles.title: My Digital Life
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: I use my laptop every day for homework and games.
paragraphs.zh: 我每天用笔记本电脑做作业和玩游戏。

paragraphs.en: My favourite app helps me learn new words.
paragraphs.zh: 我最喜欢的应用帮我学习新单词。

paragraphs.en: I also read e-books on my tablet before I go to sleep.
paragraphs.zh: 我睡觉前也在平板上看电子书。

paragraphs.en: Last night, I watched a video about how to make a robot.
paragraphs.zh: 昨晚，我看了一个关于如何制作机器人的视频。

paragraphs.en: My friend sent me a message about a new game.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友给我发了一条关于新游戏的消息。

paragraphs.en: We play online together every weekend. It is always fun.
paragraphs.zh: 我们每个周末一起在线玩。总是很有趣。

paragraphs.en: Sometimes I spend too much time on my phone.
paragraphs.zh: 有时候我在手机上花太多时间了。

paragraphs.en: My mum says I should go outside more often.
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈说我应该更经常出去。

paragraphs.en: Last summer, my family went on an amazing adventure to a small island.
paragraphs.zh: 去年夏天，我的家人去了一个小岛上进行了一次奇妙的冒险。

paragraphs.en: We took a plane to the airport, then a bus to the harbour.
paragraphs.zh: 我们坐飞机到机场，然后坐公共汽车到港口。

paragraphs.en: From the harbour, we crossed a bridge to reach the island.
paragraphs.zh: 从港口出发，我们过了一座桥到达了小岛。

paragraphs.en: The island had a beautiful castle on top of a hill.
paragraphs.zh: 岛上有一座美丽的城堡，在山顶上。

paragraphs.en: We walked along the path through the forest to the castle.
paragraphs.zh: 我们沿着穿过森林的小路走到城堡。

paragraphs.en: Inside the castle, there was a museum with old paintings.
paragraphs.zh: 城堡里面有一个博物馆，里面有古老的画作。

paragraphs.en: We had lunch at a restaurant near the corner of the main square.
paragraphs.zh: 我们在主广场拐角附近的一家餐厅吃了午饭。

paragraphs.en: The whole trip was a wonderful experience. I want to go again!
paragraphs.zh: 整个旅行是一次美妙的经历。我想再去一次！

articles.title: The School Talent Show
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Every year, our school has a talent show. Students can sing, dance or play music.
paragraphs.zh: 每年，我们学校都有才艺表演。学生们可以唱歌、跳舞或演奏音乐。

paragraphs.en: My friend Alex decided to play the guitar on stage.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友亚历克斯决定在舞台上弹吉他。

paragraphs.en: Anna wanted to sing a song, but she was very nervous.
paragraphs.zh: 安娜想唱一首歌，但她非常紧张。

paragraphs.en: Ben and his team did a skateboard show. The audience loved it!
paragraphs.zh: 本和他的团队表演了滑板秀。观众们很喜欢！

paragraphs.en: Grace took a beautiful picture of the whole show.
paragraphs.zh: 格蕾丝拍了一张整场表演的漂亮照片。

paragraphs.en: We listened to the radio interview about the show the next day.
paragraphs.zh: 第二天我们听了关于表演的广播采访。

paragraphs.en: Some students read poems and others told funny stories.
paragraphs.zh: 一些学生朗读诗歌，其他人讲有趣的故事。

paragraphs.en: At the end, everyone clapped and cheered. It was fantastic!
paragraphs.zh: 最后，每个人都鼓掌欢呼。太棒了！

paragraphs.en: I want to ride my bike on stage next year. That would be fun!
paragraphs.zh: 我明年想在舞台上骑自行车。那一定很有趣！

paragraphs.en: Our class had a cooking competition last Friday.
paragraphs.zh: 上周五我们班举行了一场烹饪比赛。

paragraphs.en: Each team had to make something using flour, butter and eggs.
paragraphs.zh: 每个团队必须用面粉、黄油和鸡蛋做一些东西。

paragraphs.en: My team decided to make biscuits with honey and cereal on top.
paragraphs.zh: 我的团队决定做饼干，上面放蜂蜜和麦片。

paragraphs.en: We used a fork to mix everything in a big bowl.
paragraphs.zh: 我们用叉子在一个大碗里搅拌所有东西。

paragraphs.en: Then we put the biscuits in the oven and waited.
paragraphs.zh: 然后我们把饼干放进烤箱等待。

paragraphs.en: Another team made cookies with chocolate. They smelled amazing.
paragraphs.zh: 另一个团队做了巧克力曲奇。闻起来太香了。

paragraphs.en: We used chopsticks to eat some noodles while waiting.
paragraphs.zh: 等待的时候我们用筷子吃了一些面条。

paragraphs.en: The teacher said our biscuits were the best. We won first place!
paragraphs.zh: 老师说我们的饼干是最好的。我们赢得了第一名！

paragraphs.en: I put the recipe in my diary so I can make them again at home.
paragraphs.zh: 我把食谱写在日记里，这样我可以在家再做。

paragraphs.en: It was a strange day. Everything felt different from usual.
paragraphs.zh: 这是奇怪的一天。一切都和平时不一样。

paragraphs.en: The sky was not blue but grey and dark.
paragraphs.zh: 天空不是蓝色的，而是灰色的、暗暗的。

paragraphs.en: I felt tired and hungry when I woke up.
paragraphs.zh: 我醒来时感觉又累又饿。

paragraphs.en: The street was empty and quiet. Nobody was outside.
paragraphs.zh: 街道空荡荡的，很安静。没有人在外面。

paragraphs.en: Then I heard a loud noise. It was very scary!
paragraphs.zh: 然后我听到一声巨响。非常吓人！

paragraphs.en: I looked outside and saw something amazing and beautiful.
paragraphs.zh: 我往外看，看到了一些令人惊叹和美丽的东西。

paragraphs.en: A hot air balloon was flying low over the buildings!
paragraphs.zh: 一个热气球正低低地飞过建筑物上方！

paragraphs.en: It was colourful — red, yellow, green and purple.
paragraphs.zh: 它色彩缤纷——红色、黄色、绿色和紫色。

paragraphs.en: The whole neighbourhood came outside to watch. Everyone was excited and happy.
paragraphs.zh: 整个社区的人都出来观看。每个人都很兴奋和开心。

paragraphs.en: It turned out to be a special event. What a wonderful surprise!
paragraphs.zh: 原来这是一个特别的活动。多么美妙的惊喜！

paragraphs.en: Last weekend was very busy. I did so many things!
paragraphs.zh: 上个周末非常忙碌。我做了好多事情！

paragraphs.en: On Saturday morning, I cleaned my room and washed my clothes.
paragraphs.zh: 周六早上，我打扫了房间，洗了衣服。

paragraphs.en: Then I walked to the shop and bought some food.
paragraphs.zh: 然后我走到商店买了一些食物。

paragraphs.en: In the afternoon, I chose a new book from the library and started to read it.
paragraphs.zh: 下午，我从图书馆选了一本新书，开始阅读。

paragraphs.en: My friend came to visit. We played games and counted our card collection.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友来拜访。我们玩游戏，数了我们的卡片收藏。

paragraphs.en: On Sunday, I got up early and went to the park.
paragraphs.zh: 周日，我早起去了公园。

paragraphs.en: I tried to learn how to skateboard, but I kept falling!
paragraphs.zh: 我试着学滑板，但一直摔倒！

paragraphs.en: After that, I added some new photos to my album.
paragraphs.zh: 之后，我在相册里添加了一些新照片。

paragraphs.en: In the evening, I completed my homework and went to bed.
paragraphs.zh: 晚上，我完成了作业就上床睡觉了。

paragraphs.en: Last night, I watched a nature documentary on television.
paragraphs.zh: 昨晚，我在电视上看了一部自然纪录片。

paragraphs.en: It was about creatures that live in different parts of the world.
paragraphs.zh: 它讲的是生活在世界不同地方的生物。

paragraphs.en: The eagle flew high above the mountains. It was looking for food.
paragraphs.zh: 鹰在山上高高飞翔。它在寻找食物。

paragraphs.en: A beautiful butterfly with gold and silver wings landed on a flower.
paragraphs.zh: 一只有着金色和银色翅膀的美丽蝴蝶落在一朵花上。

paragraphs.en: The camel walked slowly across the hot desert.
paragraphs.zh: 骆驼慢慢地走过炎热的沙漠。

paragraphs.en: Some animals have spots and some have stripes.
paragraphs.zh: 有些动物有斑点，有些有条纹。

paragraphs.en: The spotted beetle was tiny but very colourful.
paragraphs.zh: 那只有斑点的甲虫很小但非常鲜艳。

paragraphs.en: Sadly, some animals like dinosaurs are now extinct.
paragraphs.zh: 遗憾的是，一些动物如恐龙现在已经灭绝了。

paragraphs.en: We should protect animals and their fur, feathers and homes.
paragraphs.zh: 我们应该保护动物和它们的皮毛、羽毛和家园。

articles.title: First Aid at School
topics: The body & the face（身体与面部）

paragraphs.en: Today we had a first aid lesson at school.
paragraphs.zh: 今天我们在学校上了一节急救课。

paragraphs.en: The teacher showed us how to use a bandage.
paragraphs.zh: 老师教我们如何使用绷带。

paragraphs.en: If someone has a cut on their finger, you should clean it first.
paragraphs.zh: 如果有人手指上有伤口，你应该先清洗。

paragraphs.en: Then put a bandage on it to keep it clean.
paragraphs.zh: 然后贴上绷带保持清洁。

paragraphs.en: If someone falls over and hurts their knee or elbow, help them sit down.
paragraphs.zh: 如果有人摔倒伤了膝盖或肘部，帮他们坐下。

paragraphs.en: Sometimes you need to go to the chemist to buy medicine.
paragraphs.zh: 有时候你需要去药店买药。

paragraphs.en: For serious problems, you might need an x-ray at the hospital.
paragraphs.zh: 对于严重的问题，你可能需要在医院拍X光。

paragraphs.en: The teacher told us about the toe — even a small injury needs care.
paragraphs.zh: 老师告诉我们关于脚趾的知识——即使是小伤也需要护理。

paragraphs.en: I learned a lot today. First aid is an important skill for everyone.
paragraphs.zh: 我今天学到了很多。急救是每个人的重要技能。

paragraphs.en: My dad and I decided to build a treehouse in our garden.
paragraphs.zh: 我和爸爸决定在花园里建一个树屋。

paragraphs.en: We needed lots of wood for the walls and the floor.
paragraphs.zh: 我们需要很多木头来做墙壁和地板。

paragraphs.en: Dad bought some metal nails and a plastic box for our tools.
paragraphs.zh: 爸爸买了一些金属钉子和一个塑料盒子装工具。

paragraphs.en: We used paper to draw the plan first.
paragraphs.zh: 我们先用纸画了设计图。

paragraphs.en: The window was made of glass so we could see outside.
paragraphs.zh: 窗户是玻璃做的，这样我们可以看到外面。

paragraphs.en: We put a shelf on the wall for books and a key hook by the gate.
paragraphs.zh: 我们在墙上装了一个架子放书，在门边装了一个钥匙挂钩。

paragraphs.en: I wrote a letter to my friend and put it in an envelope.
paragraphs.zh: 我给朋友写了一封信，放进了信封里。

paragraphs.en: The screen of my tablet showed a video about how to build treehouses.
paragraphs.zh: 我平板电脑的屏幕上播放着一个关于如何建树屋的视频。

paragraphs.en: We also added some card decorations and used shampoo bottles as flower pots!
paragraphs.zh: 我们还加了一些卡纸装饰，用洗发水瓶子当花盆！

paragraphs.en: The treehouse is now my favourite place to read and dream.
paragraphs.zh: 树屋现在是我最喜欢的阅读和做梦的地方。

paragraphs.en: Our school is having a costume party next week.
paragraphs.zh: 我们学校下周要举办一个化装舞会。

paragraphs.en: I want to dress up as a king, so I need a crown.
paragraphs.zh: 我想打扮成国王，所以我需要一顶王冠。

paragraphs.en: My sister wants to be a princess. She has a beautiful necklace and bracelet.
paragraphs.zh: 我妹妹想当公主。她有一条漂亮的项链和手镯。

paragraphs.en: My friend will wear striped pyjamas and pretend to be a sleepwalker!
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友会穿条纹睡衣，假装是梦游者！

paragraphs.en: I also need gloves and a belt to complete my costume.
paragraphs.zh: 我还需要手套和腰带来完成我的装扮。

paragraphs.en: The teacher said we can wear any costume we like.
paragraphs.zh: 老师说我们可以穿任何我们喜欢的服装。

paragraphs.en: Some students will wear spotted shirts and gold hats.
paragraphs.zh: 一些学生会穿有斑点的衬衫，戴金色的帽子。

paragraphs.en: It is going to be a wonderful party. I cannot wait!
paragraphs.zh: 这将是一个精彩的派对。我等不及了！

paragraphs.en: A new student joined our class today. Her name is Eva.
paragraphs.zh: 今天有一个新同学加入了我们班。她的名字叫伊娃。

paragraphs.en: 'Hello! Hi!' I said. 'Welcome to our school.'
paragraphs.zh: '你好！嗨！'我说。'欢迎来到我们学校。'

paragraphs.en: 'Thanks! This school looks great!' she replied.
paragraphs.zh: '谢谢！这个学校看起来很棒！'她回答道。

paragraphs.en: I showed her around. 'Cool! You have a swimming pool!' she said.
paragraphs.zh: 我带她参观。'酷！你们有游泳池！'她说。

paragraphs.en: 'Fantastic! And look at the art room,' I said.
paragraphs.zh: '太棒了！看看美术室，'我说。

paragraphs.en: At lunch, she tried the school food. 'Brilliant!' she smiled.
paragraphs.zh: 午餐时，她尝了学校的食物。'太好了！'她笑着说。

paragraphs.en: 'Don\'t worry about finding your way. I can help you,' I told her.
paragraphs.zh: '别担心找不到路。我可以帮你，'我告诉她。

paragraphs.en: 'Goodbye! See you tomorrow!' she said at the end of the day.
paragraphs.zh: '再见！明天见！'她在放学时说。

paragraphs.en: Having a conversation with Eva was really fun. I think we will be good friends.
paragraphs.zh: 和伊娃聊天真的很有趣。我想我们会成为好朋友。

paragraphs.en: Today we went to the zoo. It was a sunny day.
paragraphs.zh: 今天我们去了动物园。天气晴朗。

paragraphs.en: First, we saw a tall giraffe eating leaves from a tree.
paragraphs.zh: 首先，我们看到一只高高的长颈鹿在吃树上的叶子。

paragraphs.en: The tiger had a long tail. It walked slowly in its cage.
paragraphs.zh: 老虎有一条长长的尾巴。它在笼子里慢慢地走。

paragraphs.en: We saw a hippo in the water and a zebra with black and white stripes.
paragraphs.zh: 我们看到一只河马在水里，还有一只有黑白条纹的斑马。

paragraphs.en: The snake was very long. The spider was small and had eight legs.
paragraphs.zh: 蛇非常长。蜘蛛很小，有八条腿。

paragraphs.en: A little frog jumped into the pond. A lizard sat on a warm rock.
paragraphs.zh: 一只小青蛙跳进了池塘。一只蜥蜴坐在温暖的石头上。

paragraphs.en: The duck was swimming with her babies. The donkey was eating grass.
paragraphs.zh: 鸭子带着她的宝宝在游泳。驴子在吃草。

paragraphs.en: We also saw a goat, some sheep and a big polar bear.
paragraphs.zh: 我们还看到了一只山羊、一些绵羊和一只大北极熊。

paragraphs.en: A bee flew past my head! I love the zoo.
paragraphs.zh: 一只蜜蜂飞过我的头顶！我喜欢动物园。

articles.title: The Colourful Garden
topics: The body & the face（身体与面部）

paragraphs.en: My grandma has a beautiful garden behind her house.
paragraphs.zh: 我奶奶的房子后面有一个美丽的花园。

paragraphs.en: There are many flowers in the garden. Some are yellow and some are orange.
paragraphs.zh: 花园里有很多花。有些是黄色的，有些是橙色的。

paragraphs.en: The big tree has gray branches and green leaves.
paragraphs.zh: 大树有灰色的树枝和绿色的叶子。

paragraphs.en: I see a purple butterfly on a flower. What a beautiful color!
paragraphs.zh: 我看到一只紫色的蝴蝶在花上。多么美丽的颜色！

paragraphs.en: My body feels warm in the sun. I turn my head to look at the sky.
paragraphs.zh: 我的身体在阳光下感觉暖暖的。我转过头看天空。

paragraphs.en: Grandma comes out with a big smile on her face.
paragraphs.zh: 奶奶带着大大的微笑走出来。

paragraphs.en: She gives me an orange juice. We sit under the tree together.
paragraphs.zh: 她给我一杯橙汁。我们一起坐在树下。

paragraphs.en: I live in a big house with my family. There are many people in my family.
paragraphs.zh: 我和家人住在一栋大房子里。我家有很多人。

paragraphs.en: My father and mother love us very much. They are our parents.
paragraphs.zh: 我的爸爸和妈妈非常爱我们。他们是我们的父母。

paragraphs.en: I am a boy. My sister is a girl. We are children.
paragraphs.zh: 我是一个男孩。我的姐姐是一个女孩。我们是孩子。

paragraphs.en: My grandma and grandpa are old but very kind.
paragraphs.zh: 我的奶奶和爷爷年纪大了，但非常和蔼。

paragraphs.en: My little sister is still a baby. She is very young.
paragraphs.zh: 我的小妹妹还是个婴儿。她非常小。

paragraphs.en: My father is a tall man. My mother is a kind woman.
paragraphs.zh: 我的爸爸是一个高个子的男人。我的妈妈是一个善良的女人。

paragraphs.en: I have a daughter and a son — oh wait, I mean my parents do!
paragraphs.zh: 我有一个女儿和一个儿子——哦等等，我是说我的父母有！

paragraphs.en: All the kids in my family like to play together. We are all grown-ups one day!
paragraphs.zh: 我家所有的孩子都喜欢一起玩。我们总有一天都会长大！

paragraphs.en: My grandparent always tells us stories before bed.
paragraphs.zh: 我的祖父母总是在睡前给我们讲故事。

paragraphs.en: My uncle has a granddaughter and a grandson. They visit us every holiday.
paragraphs.zh: 我叔叔有一个外孙女和一个外孙。他们每个假期都来看我们。

paragraphs.en: It is raining today, so I stay at home.
paragraphs.zh: 今天下雨了，所以我待在家里。

paragraphs.en: I open the door and look through the window. The rain is heavy.
paragraphs.zh: 我打开门，透过窗户看。雨下得很大。

paragraphs.en: I sit in the armchair in the hall and watch television.
paragraphs.zh: 我坐在走廊的扶手椅上看电视。

paragraphs.en: My sister plays with her doll and toy cars in the dining room.
paragraphs.zh: 我姐姐在餐厅里玩她的洋娃娃和玩具车。

paragraphs.en: Mum takes a picture of us with her camera. She puts the phone on the mat.
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈用相机给我们拍了一张照片。她把手机放在垫子上。

paragraphs.en: I find a box in the cupboard. Inside there is an old painting and a radio.
paragraphs.zh: 我在橱柜里找到一个盒子。里面有一幅旧画和一台收音机。

paragraphs.en: The rug on the floor is soft. I lie on it and watch a movie.
paragraphs.zh: 地板上的地毯很柔软。我躺在上面看电影。

paragraphs.en: Our house is not big, but it is a nice flat. I love my home.
paragraphs.zh: 我们的房子不大，但是一个不错的公寓。我爱我的家。

paragraphs.en: At night, I go to sleep in my warm bed.
paragraphs.zh: 晚上，我在温暖的床上睡觉。

paragraphs.en: Today I go to the shop with my mum to buy new clothes.
paragraphs.zh: 今天我和妈妈去商店买新衣服。

paragraphs.en: The store is near the playground. There are many things in the store.
paragraphs.zh: 商店在操场附近。商店里有很多东西。

paragraphs.en: I want to wear new jeans and a T-shirt.
paragraphs.zh: 我想穿新牛仔裤和T恤。

paragraphs.en: Mum puts a skirt and shorts in the basket.
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈把一条裙子和一条短裤放进篮子里。

paragraphs.en: I find a cool baseball cap on the shelf. I put it on my head.
paragraphs.zh: 我在架子上找到一顶很酷的棒球帽。我把它戴在头上。

paragraphs.en: My mum tries on some glasses and picks up a handbag.
paragraphs.zh: 我妈妈试戴了一些眼镜，拿起了一个手包。

paragraphs.en: I need new shoes and socks. My old shoe is under the chair.
paragraphs.zh: 我需要新鞋子和袜子。我的旧鞋在椅子下面。

paragraphs.en: I also want a new watch. I see one in the window.
paragraphs.zh: 我还想要一块新手表。我在橱窗里看到了一块。

paragraphs.en: Every Sunday, my family goes to the market to buy food.
paragraphs.zh: 每个星期天，我家人都去市场买食物。

paragraphs.en: I love to eat fruit. Today we buy grapes and pears.
paragraphs.zh: 我喜欢吃水果。今天我们买了葡萄和梨。

paragraphs.en: Mum picks up some carrots, beans and peas for dinner.
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈拿了一些胡萝卜、豆子和豌豆准备晚餐。

paragraphs.en: I want a mango and a kiwi. They are sweet and delicious.
paragraphs.zh: 我想要一个芒果和一个猕猴桃。它们又甜又好吃。

paragraphs.en: Dad buys a big watermelon and a pineapple.
paragraphs.zh: 爸爸买了一个大西瓜和一个菠萝。

paragraphs.en: We also get some lemons and limes to make lemonade.
paragraphs.zh: 我们还买了一些柠檬和青柠来做柠檬水。

paragraphs.en: For lunch, we have meat with potatoes and onions.
paragraphs.zh: 午餐，我们吃肉配土豆和洋葱。

paragraphs.en: After lunch, I drink some coconut water.
paragraphs.zh: 午餐后，我喝了一些椰子水。

paragraphs.en: For a snack, I eat some chips and a tomato.
paragraphs.zh: 当零食，我吃了一些薯片和一个番茄。

paragraphs.en: Mum makes meatballs and sausages for dinner. I also have some sweets and chocolate!
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈做了肉丸和香肠当晚餐。我还吃了一些糖果和巧克力！

paragraphs.en: We buy some fries and a pie to take home.
paragraphs.zh: 我们买了一些薯条和一个派带回家。

paragraphs.en: I love oranges too. Orange is my favourite fruit.
paragraphs.zh: 我也喜欢橙子。橙子是我最喜欢的水果。

paragraphs.en: My neighbour has a new puppy. It is very small and cute.
paragraphs.zh: 我的邻居有一只新的小狗。它非常小，很可爱。

paragraphs.en: The puppy likes to chase the kitten around the garden.
paragraphs.zh: 小狗喜欢在花园里追小猫。

paragraphs.en: One day, the puppy found a snail on the path. It was very slow.
paragraphs.zh: 有一天，小狗在小路上发现了一只蜗牛。它非常慢。

paragraphs.en: At the zoo, we saw a panda eating bamboo and a penguin standing on the ice.
paragraphs.zh: 在动物园，我们看到一只熊猫在吃竹子，一只企鹅站在冰上。

paragraphs.en: The whale was huge! It could swim very fast in the water.
paragraphs.zh: 鲸鱼好大！它能在水里游得很快。

paragraphs.en: We saw a shark too. Everyone was a little afraid.
paragraphs.zh: 我们也看到了一条鲨鱼。每个人都有点害怕。

paragraphs.en: The rabbit was in a cage. I wanted to take it home.
paragraphs.zh: 兔子在笼子里。我想把它带回家。

paragraphs.en: A fly kept buzzing around my head. It was very annoying!
paragraphs.zh: 一只苍蝇一直在我头边嗡嗡叫。太烦人了！

articles.title: A Picnic by the Lake
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Last Saturday, we went on a picnic by the lake.
paragraphs.zh: 上周六，我们去湖边野餐了。

paragraphs.en: Mum made sandwiches and a big salad with vegetables.
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈做了三明治和一份大蔬菜沙拉。

paragraphs.en: We also brought a bottle of tea and some soup in a bowl.
paragraphs.zh: 我们还带了一瓶茶和一碗汤。

paragraphs.en: I had pancakes with sauce. My sister drank a milkshake.
paragraphs.zh: 我吃了配酱汁的煎饼。我姐姐喝了一杯奶昔。

paragraphs.en: We ate noodles and pasta too. Everything was delicious.
paragraphs.zh: 我们还吃了面条和意面。一切都很美味。

paragraphs.en: After lunch, we walked around the lake. The weather was sunny.
paragraphs.zh: 午餐后，我们绕着湖散步。天气晴朗。

paragraphs.en: I was thirsty, so I drank some water from a glass.
paragraphs.zh: 我渴了，所以用玻璃杯喝了一些水。

paragraphs.en: It was a wonderful weekend. I want to go again next week.
paragraphs.zh: 这是一个美好的周末。我想下周再去。

articles.title: The School Trip to the Farm
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: On Tuesday, our class went on a trip to the farm.
paragraphs.zh: 周二，我们班去农场旅行了。

paragraphs.en: We took a bus from the bus stop near the station.
paragraphs.zh: 我们从车站附近的公交站坐了公共汽车。

paragraphs.en: The driver drove us along the road through the countryside.
paragraphs.zh: 司机沿着公路开车带我们穿过乡村。

paragraphs.en: The farmer showed us around the field. We saw many animals.
paragraphs.zh: 农夫带我们参观了田野。我们看到了很多动物。

paragraphs.en: We walked through the forest and saw a beautiful waterfall.
paragraphs.zh: 我们穿过森林，看到了一个美丽的瀑布。

paragraphs.en: The river was next to a small village. The ground was wet.
paragraphs.zh: 河流在一个小村庄旁边。地面是湿的。

paragraphs.en: We climbed a mountain and looked at the island in the lake.
paragraphs.zh: 我们爬了一座山，看着湖中的小岛。

paragraphs.en: The grass was green and the leaves were falling from the trees.
paragraphs.zh: 草是绿色的，树叶从树上飘落。

paragraphs.en: We saw a rock shaped like a star. The whole world looked beautiful.
paragraphs.zh: 我们看到一块像星星形状的石头。整个世界看起来很美。

articles.title: A Rainy Wednesday
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: It was Wednesday and the sky was full of clouds.
paragraphs.zh: 那是星期三，天空布满了云。

paragraphs.en: The weather was cloudy and windy. Then it started to rain.
paragraphs.zh: 天气多云又有风。然后开始下雨了。

paragraphs.en: I looked out the window and saw snow on the mountain.
paragraphs.zh: 我望向窗外，看到山上有雪。

paragraphs.en: After the rain, a beautiful rainbow appeared in the sky.
paragraphs.zh: 雨后，天空中出现了一道美丽的彩虹。

paragraphs.en: On Thursday, the wind stopped and the sun came out.
paragraphs.zh: 周四，风停了，太阳出来了。

paragraphs.en: On Friday, the ice on the lake melted. It was getting warm.
paragraphs.zh: 周五，湖上的冰融化了。天气变暖了。

paragraphs.en: On Sunday, we went to the city to see a film at the cinema.
paragraphs.zh: 周日，我们去城里看了一场电影。

paragraphs.en: Sometimes the weather changes every day. That is life in our town.
paragraphs.zh: 有时候天气每天都在变。这就是我们小镇的生活。

paragraphs.en: Our teacher had a brilliant idea — a treasure hunt in the school!
paragraphs.zh: 我们老师有一个绝妙的主意——在学校里寻宝！

paragraphs.en: The first clue was at the bottom of the stairs. It was easy to find.
paragraphs.zh: 第一条线索在楼梯底部。很容易找到。

paragraphs.en: The second clue was difficult. We had to look for a round shape on the wall.
paragraphs.zh: 第二条线索很难。我们必须在墙上找一个圆形。

paragraphs.en: We heard a loud noise from the machine room. It was a bit frightening.
paragraphs.zh: 我们听到机器房传来一声巨响。有点吓人。

paragraphs.en: My friend had a good laugh when she found the clue inside a shoe.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友在鞋子里找到线索时大笑起来。

paragraphs.en: There was a big difference between the first team and the last team.
paragraphs.zh: 第一个队和最后一个队之间有很大的差距。

paragraphs.en: What kind of treasure was it? A box of sweets for everyone!
paragraphs.zh: 是什么样的宝藏呢？一盒给每个人的糖果！

paragraphs.en: We went shopping at the shopping centre after school to celebrate.
paragraphs.zh: 放学后我们去购物中心购物庆祝。

articles.title: My Sick Day
topics: The body & the face（身体与面部）

paragraphs.en: I woke up feeling ill. My head hurt and I had a headache.
paragraphs.zh: 我醒来感觉不舒服。我头疼，有头痛。

paragraphs.en: I also had a stomach-ache and an earache. I felt terrible.
paragraphs.zh: 我还肚子疼和耳朵疼。我感觉糟透了。

paragraphs.en: Mum asked: What is the matter? I said I felt sick and tired.
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈问：怎么了？我说我感觉恶心又累。

paragraphs.en: The nurse at school said I should go home and rest.
paragraphs.zh: 学校的护士说我应该回家休息。

paragraphs.en: I started to cry because my shoulder and stomach hurt so much.
paragraphs.zh: 我开始哭了，因为我的肩膀和胃太疼了。

paragraphs.en: Mum said: Are you fine? I said: Not really.
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈说：你还好吗？我说：不太好。

paragraphs.en: She gave me medicine and I brushed my tooth with my toothbrush.
paragraphs.zh: 她给了我药，我用牙刷刷了牙。

paragraphs.en: My hair looked messy. I was too thin and weak from being sick.
paragraphs.zh: 我的头发看起来很乱。我因为生病变得又瘦又虚弱。

paragraphs.en: The next day I felt much better. My face was not so fat and pale anymore.
paragraphs.zh: 第二天我感觉好多了。我的脸不再那么胖和苍白了。

paragraphs.en: I had straight hair again and my moustache — just kidding, I am only ten!
paragraphs.zh: 我的头发又变直了，我的胡子——开玩笑的，我才十岁！

paragraphs.en: Jack was a clever boy. He loved solving puzzles.
paragraphs.zh: 杰克是一个聪明的男孩。他喜欢解谜。

paragraphs.en: One day, something different happened at school. The classroom was all wrong.
paragraphs.zh: 有一天，学校发生了不同的事情。教室里一切都不对。

paragraphs.en: The window was open and the room was wet. It was not safe.
paragraphs.zh: 窗户开着，房间是湿的。不安全。

paragraphs.en: Everyone was surprised and frightened. The teacher looked worried.
paragraphs.zh: 每个人都很惊讶和害怕。老师看起来很担心。

paragraphs.en: Jack was brave. He said: Do not worry, I have an idea.
paragraphs.zh: 杰克很勇敢。他说：别担心，我有个主意。

paragraphs.en: He was careful and quiet. He looked at every corner of the room.
paragraphs.zh: 他很仔细，很安静。他看了房间的每个角落。

paragraphs.en: The answer was easy! The wind blew the window open. It was windy and cloudy outside.
paragraphs.zh: 答案很简单！风把窗户吹开了。外面又刮风又多云。

paragraphs.en: Everyone felt well again. Jack was famous in the school after that day.
paragraphs.zh: 每个人都感觉好了。那天之后杰克在学校出名了。

articles.title: The Exciting Funfair
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Last weekend, we went to the funfair in the town centre.
paragraphs.zh: 上周末，我们去了市中心的游乐场。

paragraphs.en: We took a ticket at the station and rode the bus to the square.
paragraphs.zh: 我们在车站买了票，坐公共汽车到了广场。

paragraphs.en: The circus was exciting! A clown made everyone laugh.
paragraphs.zh: 马戏团太刺激了！一个小丑让每个人都笑了。

paragraphs.en: We saw a pirate show and a pop star singing on stage.
paragraphs.zh: 我们看了一场海盗表演和一个流行歌星在台上唱歌。

paragraphs.en: I wanted to ride the tractor, but the line was too long.
paragraphs.zh: 我想坐拖拉机，但队伍太长了。

paragraphs.en: We looked at the map to find the swimming pool and the sports centre.
paragraphs.zh: 我们看地图找游泳池和体育中心。

paragraphs.en: The library was next to the market. We went there to read a comic book.
paragraphs.zh: 图书馆在市场旁边。我们去那里看漫画书。

paragraphs.en: It was the best day. I want to go to the funfair every year.
paragraphs.zh: 这是最棒的一天。我想每年都去游乐场。

articles.title: The Country Adventure
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: During the holiday, we went to the country for a trip.
paragraphs.zh: 假期里，我们去乡下旅行了。

paragraphs.en: We drove past a small village and stopped by a river.
paragraphs.zh: 我们开车经过一个小村庄，在一条河边停下。

paragraphs.en: I saw a model of a boat in the shop. I wanted to buy it.
paragraphs.zh: 我在商店里看到一个船的模型。我想买它。

paragraphs.en: We went fishing by the lake. The moon was bright at night.
paragraphs.zh: 我们在湖边钓鱼。晚上月亮很亮。

paragraphs.en: The cook at the hotel made us a wonderful dinner.
paragraphs.zh: 酒店的厨师给我们做了一顿美味的晚餐。

paragraphs.en: I like to work in the garden. I water the plants every morning.
paragraphs.zh: 我喜欢在花园里干活。我每天早上给植物浇水。

paragraphs.en: The wave in the sea was big. We played on the beach all afternoon.
paragraphs.zh: 海里的浪很大。我们整个下午都在沙滩上玩。

paragraphs.en: The film star lives in this town. Everyone knows her.
paragraphs.zh: 那个电影明星住在这个镇上。每个人都认识她。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, I got up early and got dressed for school.
paragraphs.zh: 昨天，我早起穿好衣服去上学。

paragraphs.en: I had to catch the bus. I got on at the bus stop.
paragraphs.zh: 我必须赶公共汽车。我在公交站上了车。

paragraphs.en: At school, the teacher taught us how to build a model.
paragraphs.zh: 在学校，老师教我们如何搭建一个模型。

paragraphs.en: I had to think carefully. I brought my tools from home.
paragraphs.zh: 我必须仔细思考。我从家里带了工具。

paragraphs.en: My friend helped me fix the broken part. We climbed up to get more wood.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友帮我修好了坏掉的部分。我们爬上去拿更多的木头。

paragraphs.en: I sent a message to invite my friends to see it.
paragraphs.zh: 我发了一条消息邀请朋友们来看。

paragraphs.en: We had to wait for everyone. Then I took off my jacket and put on my apron.
paragraphs.zh: 我们必须等所有人。然后我脱下夹克，穿上围裙。

paragraphs.en: I need to practise more. I want to travel and shop around the world.
paragraphs.zh: 我需要多练习。我想环游世界去购物。

paragraphs.en: When I grow up, I want to buy a big house and feed many animals.
paragraphs.zh: 当我长大后，我想买一栋大房子，养很多动物。

paragraphs.en: I must not lose my homework. I will hide it in my bag.
paragraphs.zh: 我不能丢了作业。我会把它藏在书包里。

paragraphs.en: Every morning, I wake up at seven o'clock.
paragraphs.zh: 每天早上，我七点钟醒来。

paragraphs.en: I get undressed and take a shower. Then I wash my face.
paragraphs.zh: 我脱掉衣服去洗澡。然后洗脸。

paragraphs.en: I use my toothbrush and toothpaste to brush my teeth.
paragraphs.zh: 我用牙刷和牙膏刷牙。

paragraphs.en: I dry my hair with a towel and walk down the stairs.
paragraphs.zh: 我用毛巾擦干头发，走下楼梯。

paragraphs.en: I go upstairs to get my bag, then come back down.
paragraphs.zh: 我上楼去拿书包，然后再下来。

paragraphs.en: Mum calls me: Come on! You must not be late!
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈叫我：快点！你不能迟到！

paragraphs.en: I look for my shoes and change into my school uniform.
paragraphs.zh: 我找鞋子，换上校服。

paragraphs.en: I check the internet on my phone for the weather.
paragraphs.zh: 我在手机上查看天气。

paragraphs.en: I shout goodbye and move quickly to the bus stop.
paragraphs.zh: 我大喊再见，快速走向公交站。

paragraphs.en: I drop my water bottle but I pick it up quickly.
paragraphs.zh: 我掉了水瓶，但很快捡了起来。

paragraphs.en: Our teacher played a game with us. She said a word and we had to act it out.
paragraphs.zh: 我们老师和我们玩了一个游戏。她说一个词，我们必须表演出来。

paragraphs.en: Tom pretended to be asleep. Then he jumped up and said he was awake!
paragraphs.zh: 汤姆假装睡着了。然后他跳起来说他醒了！

paragraphs.en: The game was not boring at all. It was very exciting.
paragraphs.zh: 这个游戏一点也不无聊。非常刺激。

paragraphs.en: Sally was naughty. She made a loud noise and scared everyone.
paragraphs.zh: 萨莉很淘气。她发出很大的声音，吓到了每个人。

paragraphs.en: The tall boy was strong but slow. The little girl was quick and pretty.
paragraphs.zh: 那个高个子男孩很强壮但很慢。那个小女孩又快又漂亮。

paragraphs.en: It was hot and sunny outside, but inside it was cool and dry.
paragraphs.zh: 外面又热又晴，但里面又凉爽又干燥。

paragraphs.en: The huge dog was dangerous, but the sweet cat was safe.
paragraphs.zh: 那只巨大的狗很危险，但那只可爱的猫很安全。

paragraphs.en: The worst part was when it was over. The best part was playing again!
paragraphs.zh: 最糟糕的部分是游戏结束的时候。最好的部分是再玩一次！

paragraphs.en: It was all right in the end. Everyone was busy but happy.
paragraphs.zh: 最后一切都还好。每个人都很忙但很开心。

articles.title: The Email from My Pen Pal

paragraphs.en: I got an email from my pen pal. She asked: How are you?
paragraphs.zh: 我收到了笔友的一封电子邮件。她问：你好吗？

paragraphs.en: She wanted to know how much the trip cost and how often I travel.
paragraphs.zh: 她想知道旅行花了多少钱，我多久旅行一次。

paragraphs.en: I wrote back: I sometimes go on holiday. When do you travel?
paragraphs.zh: 我回信说：我有时候去度假。你什么时候旅行？

paragraphs.en: She said: I only go out on weekends. Why? Because I am busy.
paragraphs.zh: 她说：我只在周末出去。为什么？因为我很忙。

paragraphs.en: Everyone likes her. Everything she does is interesting.
paragraphs.zh: 每个人都喜欢她。她做的每件事都很有趣。

paragraphs.en: Someone told me she is very clever. Something about her is special.
paragraphs.zh: 有人告诉我她很聪明。她有些地方很特别。

paragraphs.en: I asked: Which city do you live in? Where is your school?
paragraphs.zh: 我问：你住在哪个城市？你的学校在哪里？

paragraphs.en: She said: Nothing is more fun than writing to you!
paragraphs.zh: 她说：没有什么比给你写信更有趣了！

paragraphs.en: I replied quickly and quietly at my desk. Then I went upstairs.
paragraphs.zh: 我在书桌前快速安静地回了信。然后我上楼了。

paragraphs.en: I slowly read her letter again. Who is this amazing person?
paragraphs.zh: 我慢慢地又读了一遍她的信。这个了不起的人是谁？

paragraphs.en: Yesterday was a bad day. Actually, it was worse than bad.
paragraphs.zh: 昨天是糟糕的一天。实际上，比糟糕还糟糕。

paragraphs.en: I woke up late. It was already half past eight.
paragraphs.zh: 我起晚了。已经八点半了。

paragraphs.en: I ran down the stairs loudly. Mum said: Be quiet!
paragraphs.zh: 我大声地跑下楼梯。妈妈说：安静点！

paragraphs.en: I went to the top of the bus but there was no seat. I had to stand at the bottom.
paragraphs.zh: 我去了公共汽车的上层，但没有座位。我只好站在下层。

paragraphs.en: At school, I got the second question wrong. Then the third one too.
paragraphs.zh: 在学校，我第二题答错了。然后第三题也错了。

paragraphs.en: I felt badly about it. I often make mistakes when I am tired.
paragraphs.zh: 我为此感觉很糟糕。我累的时候经常犯错。

paragraphs.en: Then it rained and I got all wet. Everything went wrong.
paragraphs.zh: 然后下雨了，我全身都湿了。一切都出了问题。

paragraphs.en: But then my friend said: Come on! Let us play! And I felt better.
paragraphs.zh: 但后来我朋友说：来吧！我们去玩！然后我感觉好多了。

paragraphs.en: We moved to a new house. The address is 25 Park Road.
paragraphs.zh: 我们搬到了新房子。地址是公园路25号。

paragraphs.en: The house has a basement. It is dark and cold down there.
paragraphs.zh: 房子有一个地下室。那里又暗又冷。

paragraphs.en: We took the elevator to the second floor.
paragraphs.zh: 我们坐电梯到了二楼。

paragraphs.en: I put my books on the shelf and my toys into the box.
paragraphs.zh: 我把书放在架子上，把玩具放进盒子里。

paragraphs.en: The cat jumped off the table and ran around the room.
paragraphs.zh: 猫从桌子上跳下来，在房间里跑来跑去。

paragraphs.en: I looked out of the window. The garden was beautiful.
paragraphs.zh: 我从窗户往外看。花园很漂亮。

paragraphs.en: Mum walked up the stairs. Dad was waiting at the top.
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈走上楼梯。爸爸在上面等着。

paragraphs.en: We sat by the fire. It was warm and nice.
paragraphs.zh: 我们坐在火炉旁。又暖和又舒服。

paragraphs.en: After dinner, I went round the house to check every room.
paragraphs.zh: 晚饭后，我在房子里转了一圈检查每个房间。

articles.title: The School Play
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Our school is having a play on Friday. I am very excited.
paragraphs.zh: 我们学校周五要演一出戏。我非常兴奋。

paragraphs.en: We practise every day after school. The practice is in the gym.
paragraphs.zh: 我们每天放学后练习。练习在体育馆里。

paragraphs.en: I play a player in a football game. My friend plays the goal keeper.
paragraphs.zh: 我演一个足球比赛中的球员。我的朋友演守门员。

paragraphs.en: We need ice skates for one scene. The ice skating part is funny.
paragraphs.zh: 有一幕我们需要溜冰鞋。溜冰的部分很搞笑。

paragraphs.en: Some kids do roller skating on stage. Others skip and hop around.
paragraphs.zh: 一些孩子在台上轮滑。其他人跳来跳去。

paragraphs.en: We kick a ball and score a goal. The net catches the ball.
paragraphs.zh: 我们踢球进了一个球。网接住了球。

paragraphs.en: After the play, we sail paper boats in the pool. It is fun.
paragraphs.zh: 演出结束后，我们在水池里放纸船。很有趣。

paragraphs.en: We go shopping for a DVD of the play. We also buy a CD of the music.
paragraphs.zh: 我们去买了一张演出的DVD。我们还买了一张音乐CD。

paragraphs.en: The movie version will come out next month. I cannot wait to see it.
paragraphs.zh: 电影版下个月就要出来了。我等不及要看了。

articles.title: The Dance Competition
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: On Saturday, there was a dance competition at the sports centre.
paragraphs.zh: 周六，体育中心有一场舞蹈比赛。

paragraphs.en: We walked along the road to the place. It was a straight path.
paragraphs.zh: 我们沿着路走到那个地方。是一条直路。

paragraphs.en: The band played music and everyone danced.
paragraphs.zh: 乐队演奏音乐，每个人都跳舞。

paragraphs.en: I read a comic about dancing before the show.
paragraphs.zh: 演出前我看了一本关于跳舞的漫画。

paragraphs.en: We sent a text to our friends to come and watch.
paragraphs.zh: 我们给朋友发了短信让他们来看。

paragraphs.en: The website had all the information about the event.
paragraphs.zh: 网站上有关于活动的所有信息。

paragraphs.en: I made a mistake in my dance, but the teacher said it was all right.
paragraphs.zh: 我在舞蹈中犯了一个错误，但老师说没关系。

paragraphs.en: We did our homework about the competition. It was fun to write about.
paragraphs.zh: 我们写了关于比赛的作业。写起来很有趣。

paragraphs.en: I want to swim in the swimming pool after the next competition.
paragraphs.zh: 下次比赛后我想去游泳池游泳。

paragraphs.en: Once upon a time, there was an angry king who lived in a big castle.
paragraphs.zh: 从前，有一个愤怒的国王住在一座大城堡里。

paragraphs.en: He was sad and unhappy because he had no friends.
paragraphs.zh: 他很伤心、不开心，因为他没有朋友。

paragraphs.en: The castle was ugly and dirty. Everything was broken.
paragraphs.zh: 城堡又丑又脏。所有东西都坏了。

paragraphs.en: One day, a kind and friendly girl came to visit.
paragraphs.zh: 有一天，一个善良友好的女孩来拜访。

paragraphs.en: She said: Your problem is that you are alone. You need friends.
paragraphs.zh: 她说：你的问题是你太孤独了。你需要朋友。

paragraphs.en: The king felt sorry. He said: You are right. I have been unkind.
paragraphs.zh: 国王感到抱歉。他说：你说得对。我一直不友善。

paragraphs.en: He opened the castle door and let the light come in.
paragraphs.zh: 他打开了城堡的门，让光照进来。

paragraphs.en: Soon the castle was lovely and tidy. The king was pleased and happy.
paragraphs.zh: 很快城堡变得可爱又整洁。国王很高兴。

paragraphs.en: The secret to happiness is being nice to others. What a wonderful surprise!
paragraphs.zh: 幸福的秘密是对别人好。多么美妙的惊喜！

articles.title: The School Competition
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Our school had a big competition last month.
paragraphs.zh: 我们学校上个月举办了一场大型比赛。

paragraphs.en: Students from the college and university also came.
paragraphs.zh: 大学和学院的学生也来了。

paragraphs.en: The teacher wrote the questions on the board. We had to answer them.
paragraphs.zh: 老师把问题写在黑板上。我们必须回答。

paragraphs.en: I used a pen and pencil to write. I also needed a ruler and rubber.
paragraphs.zh: 我用钢笔和铅笔写字。我还需要尺子和橡皮。

paragraphs.en: The English class was in the classroom on the second floor.
paragraphs.zh: 英语课在二楼的教室里。

paragraphs.en: I had to spell every word correctly. The example was on the page.
paragraphs.zh: 我必须正确拼写每个单词。例子在页面上。

paragraphs.en: I used the keyboard to type my answer on the computer.
paragraphs.zh: 我用键盘在电脑上打出我的答案。

paragraphs.en: The group project was about art and music. We drew a poster.
paragraphs.zh: 小组项目是关于艺术和音乐的。我们画了一张海报。

paragraphs.en: I won a prize! The teacher told me I did a great job.
paragraphs.zh: 我赢了一个奖！老师告诉我我做得很好。

paragraphs.en: I sit at my desk every morning. The door is behind me.
paragraphs.zh: 我每天早上坐在书桌前。门在我身后。

paragraphs.en: The teacher asks us to open our books and look at the lesson.
paragraphs.zh: 老师让我们打开书本，看这节课的内容。

paragraphs.en: I listen carefully. The teacher draws a line on the board.
paragraphs.zh: 我仔细听。老师在黑板上画了一条线。

paragraphs.en: She writes a sentence and asks us to read it.
paragraphs.zh: 她写了一个句子，让我们读。

paragraphs.en: I use my eraser to fix a mistake. Then I colour the picture with crayons.
paragraphs.zh: 我用橡皮擦改正了一个错误。然后我用蜡笔给图片上色。

paragraphs.en: The bookcase is by the window. The wall has many paintings on it.
paragraphs.zh: 书架在窗户旁边。墙上有很多画。

paragraphs.en: I know the answer! I stand up and tell the class.
paragraphs.zh: 我知道答案！我站起来告诉全班。

paragraphs.en: The playground is outside. We can see it from the cupboard near the door.
paragraphs.zh: 操场在外面。我们从门旁的柜子那里能看到它。

paragraphs.en: I close my book and sit down. The lesson is over.
paragraphs.zh: 我合上书坐下。这节课结束了。

paragraphs.en: I find my scissors in my backpack and cut out a paper star.
paragraphs.zh: 我在背包里找到剪刀，剪出一颗纸星星。

articles.title: The Sports Festival
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Today is the sports festival at our school. Everyone is excited.
paragraphs.zh: 今天是我们学校的运动节。每个人都很兴奋。

paragraphs.en: We play football, basketball and baseball on the field.
paragraphs.zh: 我们在场地上踢足球、打篮球和棒球。

paragraphs.en: I throw the ball to my friend. He catches it and runs.
paragraphs.zh: 我把球扔给朋友。他接住球跑了起来。

paragraphs.en: Some students play table tennis and badminton in the gym.
paragraphs.zh: 一些学生在体育馆里打乒乓球和羽毛球。

paragraphs.en: My hobby is swimming. I swim in the pool every week.
paragraphs.zh: 我的爱好是游泳。我每周都在泳池里游泳。

paragraphs.en: We also play hockey and tennis. I need a tennis racket.
paragraphs.zh: 我们还打曲棍球和网球。我需要一个网球拍。

paragraphs.en: I enjoy watching the game. The team with the most goals wins.
paragraphs.zh: 我喜欢看比赛。进球最多的队伍获胜。

paragraphs.en: I take a photo of the winner with my camera.
paragraphs.zh: 我用相机给获胜者拍了一张照片。

paragraphs.en: After the match, we watch television and listen to a song.
paragraphs.zh: 比赛结束后，我们看电视，听一首歌。

articles.title: The Toy Shop
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: I went to the toy shop with my dad. There were so many toys!
paragraphs.zh: 我和爸爸去了玩具店。那里有好多玩具！

paragraphs.en: I saw a robot, a teddy bear and a monster doll.
paragraphs.zh: 我看到了一个机器人、一只泰迪熊和一个怪物玩偶。

paragraphs.en: There was a helicopter and a plane hanging from the ceiling.
paragraphs.zh: 天花板上挂着一架直升机和一架飞机。

paragraphs.en: I wanted a kite and a bike, but they were too expensive.
paragraphs.zh: 我想要一个风筝和一辆自行车，但它们太贵了。

paragraphs.en: My sister chose a doll and a board game. She loves puzzles.
paragraphs.zh: 我姐姐选了一个洋娃娃和一个棋盘游戏。她喜欢拼图。

paragraphs.en: I found a car, a lorry and a truck on the bottom shelf.
paragraphs.zh: 我在底层架子上找到了一辆小汽车、一辆卡车和一辆大卡车。

paragraphs.en: Dad bought me a football and a balloon. I was so happy!
paragraphs.zh: 爸爸给我买了一个足球和一个气球。我太开心了！

paragraphs.en: We also got a boat and a train set. I will play with them at home.
paragraphs.zh: 我们还买了一艘船和一套火车。我会在家里玩。

articles.title: The Big Race
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Last Saturday, there was a big race in our city.
paragraphs.zh: 上周六，我们城市举办了一场大型比赛。

paragraphs.en: People came by bus, car and taxi. Some rode their bikes and motorbikes.
paragraphs.zh: 人们坐公共汽车、小汽车和出租车来。有些人骑自行车和摩托车。

paragraphs.en: The racing cars were fast. They drove on the motorway to the stadium.
paragraphs.zh: 赛车很快。它们在高速公路上开到体育场。

paragraphs.en: We took the train to the railway station. Then we walked to the track.
paragraphs.zh: 我们坐火车到火车站。然后走到赛道。

paragraphs.en: The ambulance and fire engine were ready in case of an accident.
paragraphs.zh: 救护车和消防车已经准备好以防事故。

paragraphs.en: A ship passed by on the river. A rocket was painted on its side.
paragraphs.zh: 一艘船从河上经过。船身上画着一枚火箭。

paragraphs.en: The traffic was heavy. Every passenger had to wait.
paragraphs.zh: 交通很拥挤。每个乘客都必须等待。

paragraphs.en: The winner got a tour of the city. The wheel of his car was golden.
paragraphs.zh: 获胜者获得了一次城市之旅。他的车轮是金色的。

paragraphs.en: I want to drive a spaceship one day. That is my dream.
paragraphs.zh: 我想有一天驾驶宇宙飞船。那是我的梦想。

articles.title: The Weather Report
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Good morning! Here is today's weather report.
paragraphs.zh: 早上好！这是今天的天气预报。

paragraphs.en: This morning, there is fog in the city. It is very foggy.
paragraphs.zh: 今天早上，城市里有雾。非常雾蒙蒙的。

paragraphs.en: In the afternoon, there will be a storm with strong wind.
paragraphs.zh: 下午会有暴风雨，风很大。

paragraphs.en: The sun will come out in the evening. It will be a nice night.
paragraphs.zh: 太阳会在傍晚出来。会是一个美好的夜晚。

paragraphs.en: Tomorrow morning will be warm. The clock says it is six a.m.
paragraphs.zh: 明天早上会很暖和。时钟显示现在是早上六点。

paragraphs.en: In the spring, flowers grow. In the summer, we go to the beach.
paragraphs.zh: 春天，花儿开放。夏天，我们去海滩。

paragraphs.en: In the autumn, leaves fall. In the winter, it snows.
paragraphs.zh: 秋天，树叶飘落。冬天，下雪。

paragraphs.en: Today is a day in March. The date is the twenty-first.
paragraphs.zh: 今天是三月的一天。日期是二十一号。

paragraphs.en: The calendar shows all the months: January, February, April, May, June.
paragraphs.zh: 日历显示所有月份：一月、二月、四月、五月、六月。

paragraphs.en: July, August, September, October, November and December.
paragraphs.zh: 七月、八月、九月、十月、十一月和十二月。

articles.title: The Birthday Party
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Today is my birthday! I am having a party this afternoon.
paragraphs.zh: 今天是我的生日！我今天下午要开派对。

paragraphs.en: Hooray! All my friends are coming. Wow, there are so many presents!
paragraphs.zh: 万岁！我所有的朋友都要来。哇，有好多礼物！

paragraphs.en: Amazing! My friend brought a violin and a drum.
paragraphs.zh: 太棒了！我的朋友带来了一把小提琴和一面鼓。

paragraphs.en: Excellent! We played chess and did a quiz together.
paragraphs.zh: 太好了！我们一起下棋和做问答游戏。

paragraphs.en: We collected cards and read a magazine about pop music.
paragraphs.zh: 我们收集卡片，看了一本关于流行音乐的杂志。

paragraphs.en: My friend played the piano and sang a tune. Everyone danced.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友弹钢琴唱了一首曲子。每个人都跳舞了。

paragraphs.en: We watched a cartoon on a big screen. The channel was great.
paragraphs.zh: 我们在大屏幕上看了一部动画片。频道很棒。

paragraphs.en: See you next year! Bye everyone!
paragraphs.zh: 明年见！大家再见！

paragraphs.en: Oh dear, I forgot to take a photo! No problem, we will take one next time.
paragraphs.zh: 哦天哪，我忘了拍照！没关系，下次我们再拍。

articles.title: The Camping Trip
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: We went camping in the mountains last summer.
paragraphs.zh: 去年夏天我们去山里露营了。

paragraphs.en: We put up a tent and used a flashlight to see in the dark.
paragraphs.zh: 我们搭起帐篷，用手电筒在黑暗中看路。

paragraphs.en: The night was quiet. We could hear the sound of the stream.
paragraphs.zh: 夜晚很安静。我们能听到小溪的声音。

paragraphs.en: I was a little worried and frightening sounds came from the cave.
paragraphs.zh: 我有点担心，洞穴里传来吓人的声音。

paragraphs.en: But it was just a small animal. How funny!
paragraphs.zh: 但那只是一只小动物。多有趣！

paragraphs.en: The view from the hill was enormous. We could see the whole land.
paragraphs.zh: 从山丘上看到的景色非常壮观。我们能看到整片土地。

paragraphs.en: The air was fresh and the environment was beautiful.
paragraphs.zh: 空气清新，环境优美。

paragraphs.en: We found a pond with stones around it. The water was deep.
paragraphs.zh: 我们发现了一个周围有石头的池塘。水很深。

paragraphs.en: It was an unusual and interesting experience. I felt lucky to be there.
paragraphs.zh: 这是一次不寻常而有趣的经历。我觉得很幸运能在那里。

paragraphs.en: My husband and wife — I mean my mum and dad — are cooking dinner.
paragraphs.zh: 我的丈夫和妻子——我是说我的爸爸妈妈——在做晚饭。

paragraphs.en: We are having a big meal tonight. The whole family is here.
paragraphs.zh: 今晚我们要吃一顿大餐。全家人都在。

paragraphs.en: Mum cuts the strawberries with a knife. Dad adds salt and pepper.
paragraphs.zh: 妈妈用刀切草莓。爸爸加盐和胡椒。

paragraphs.en: I eat a piece of pizza as a snack while I wait.
paragraphs.zh: 我等的时候吃了一块比萨当零食。

paragraphs.en: The jam and yoghurt are on the table. The olives are in a bowl.
paragraphs.zh: 果酱和酸奶在桌上。橄榄在碗里。

paragraphs.en: I use a spoon to eat the soup. It smells delicious.
paragraphs.zh: 我用勺子喝汤。闻起来很香。

paragraphs.en: The sugar is sweet. I can taste the chocolate in the cake.
paragraphs.zh: 糖是甜的。我能尝到蛋糕里的巧克力味。

paragraphs.en: My surname is the same as my dad's. We are a married couple's children.
paragraphs.zh: 我的姓和爸爸一样。我们是一对已婚夫妇的孩子。

paragraphs.en: We went to the science museum in the north of the city.
paragraphs.zh: 我们去了城市北部的科学博物馆。

paragraphs.en: The museum is next to the bank and opposite the post office.
paragraphs.zh: 博物馆在银行旁边，邮局对面。

paragraphs.en: We walked past the police station and the fire station.
paragraphs.zh: 我们走过了警察局和消防站。

paragraphs.en: The hotel is in the south, near the theatre.
paragraphs.zh: 酒店在南边，靠近剧院。

paragraphs.en: I saw a design of an engine. It was very interesting.
paragraphs.zh: 我看到了一个引擎的设计。非常有趣。

paragraphs.en: There was information about money from different countries.
paragraphs.zh: 有关于不同国家货币的信息。

paragraphs.en: I bought a postcard at the shop. I also got a dictionary.
paragraphs.zh: 我在商店买了一张明信片。我还买了一本字典。

paragraphs.en: The factory in the west makes robots. The skyscraper is very tall.
paragraphs.zh: 西边的工厂制造机器人。摩天大楼非常高。

paragraphs.en: We need to get to the club before it closes. The way is to the left.
paragraphs.zh: 我们需要在俱乐部关门前到达。路在左边。

paragraphs.en: It was a lazy Sunday. I stayed in bed until late.
paragraphs.zh: 这是一个懒洋洋的星期天。我在床上待到很晚。

paragraphs.en: My room was untidy. Mum said: Please tidy your room!
paragraphs.zh: 我的房间很乱。妈妈说：请整理你的房间！

paragraphs.en: I was bored and a little bit hungry.
paragraphs.zh: 我很无聊，有点饿。

paragraphs.en: The food was cheap but delicious. I was pleased.
paragraphs.zh: 食物便宜但好吃。我很满意。

paragraphs.en: My friend is unfriendly sometimes, but today she was nice.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友有时候不太友好，但今天她很好。

paragraphs.en: The old house looked horrible from the front, but lovely inside.
paragraphs.zh: 老房子从正面看很可怕，但里面很可爱。

paragraphs.en: I felt interested in the new book. It was about a poor boy who became rich.
paragraphs.zh: 我对新书很感兴趣。它讲的是一个穷男孩变富的故事。

paragraphs.en: The story was popular and important. Everyone should read it.
paragraphs.zh: 这个故事很受欢迎，也很重要。每个人都应该读。

paragraphs.en: I was ready to go out. The weather was warm and the sky was clear.
paragraphs.zh: 我准备好出门了。天气暖和，天空晴朗。

paragraphs.en: It was a good day. Not the same as yesterday, but still lovely.
paragraphs.zh: 这是美好的一天。和昨天不一样，但仍然很美好。

paragraphs.en: My cat is missing! I need to look for her everywhere.
paragraphs.zh: 我的猫不见了！我需要到处找她。

paragraphs.en: I love my cat. She is my favourite pet.
paragraphs.zh: 我爱我的猫。她是我最喜欢的宠物。

paragraphs.en: I started to look around the house. I wanted to find her.
paragraphs.zh: 我开始在房子周围找。我想找到她。

paragraphs.en: I pointed at the garden and said: Let us look there!
paragraphs.zh: 我指着花园说：我们去那里找！

paragraphs.en: My friend agreed to help. She showed me where to look.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友同意帮忙。她给我看了该找的地方。

paragraphs.en: We stopped to talk to the neighbour. He waved at us.
paragraphs.zh: 我们停下来和邻居说话。他向我们挥手。

paragraphs.en: I like to paint pictures of my cat. She looks like a little tiger.
paragraphs.zh: 我喜欢画我的猫的画。她看起来像一只小老虎。

paragraphs.en: Suddenly, I heard a sound. I picked up a box and there she was!
paragraphs.zh: 突然，我听到一个声音。我拿起一个盒子，她就在那里！

paragraphs.en: I thanked my friend. We hugged and I felt so happy.
paragraphs.zh: 我感谢了我的朋友。我们拥抱了，我感到非常开心。

paragraphs.en: I study many subjects at school. My favourite is geography.
paragraphs.zh: 我在学校学很多科目。我最喜欢的是地理。

paragraphs.en: In maths class, we learn about numbers and shapes.
paragraphs.zh: 在数学课上，我们学习数字和形状。

paragraphs.en: History is interesting. We learn about old kings and queens.
paragraphs.zh: 历史很有趣。我们学习古代的国王和王后。

paragraphs.en: In science, we do experiments. The student must be careful.
paragraphs.zh: 在科学课上，我们做实验。学生必须小心。

paragraphs.en: I use a dictionary to learn new words in my language class.
paragraphs.zh: 我在语言课上用字典学习新单词。

paragraphs.en: The timetable shows all our classes. We have gym on Monday.
paragraphs.zh: 课程表显示了我们所有的课。我们周一有体育课。

paragraphs.en: I carry my rucksack to school every day. It is very heavy.
paragraphs.zh: 我每天背着背包去上学。它非常重。

paragraphs.en: We have a flag in front of the school. It is red and blue.
paragraphs.zh: 学校前面有一面旗帜。它是红蓝色的。

paragraphs.en: I am online every evening to study. I use the school website.
paragraphs.zh: 我每天晚上都上网学习。我用学校的网站。

paragraphs.en: Today we had a cooking class. The teacher explained the recipe.
paragraphs.zh: 今天我们上了一节烹饪课。老师解释了食谱。

paragraphs.en: First, we had to prepare all the ingredients.
paragraphs.zh: 首先，我们必须准备好所有的食材。

paragraphs.en: I used a brush to clean the cooker. Then I put the cushion on the chair.
paragraphs.zh: 我用刷子清洁了炉灶。然后我把靠垫放在椅子上。

paragraphs.en: We had to mix the flour and push the dough flat.
paragraphs.zh: 我们必须搅拌面粉，把面团压平。

paragraphs.en: I used a comb to — wait, that is for hair! I used a fork instead.
paragraphs.zh: 我用梳子——等等，那是梳头发的！我改用叉子。

paragraphs.en: We had to pull the bread apart and touch it to check if it was ready.
paragraphs.zh: 我们必须把面包掰开，摸一摸看是否做好了。

paragraphs.en: I decided to follow the recipe carefully. I did not want to make a mistake.
paragraphs.zh: 我决定仔细按照食谱做。我不想犯错。

paragraphs.en: The entrance to the kitchen was small. We had to enter one by one.
paragraphs.zh: 厨房的入口很小。我们必须一个一个进去。

paragraphs.en: I turned on the oven and turned off the light. The soap was near the sink.
paragraphs.zh: 我打开烤箱，关掉灯。肥皂在水槽旁边。

paragraphs.en: Let's play a game! I will say a verb and you do the action.
paragraphs.zh: 我们来玩个游戏！我说一个动词，你做动作。

paragraphs.en: Can you hold this book? Now give it to your friend.
paragraphs.zh: 你能拿着这本书吗？现在把它给你的朋友。

paragraphs.en: I said: Put the pen on the desk. He said: I can do that!
paragraphs.zh: 我说：把笔放在桌上。他说：我能做到！

paragraphs.en: She began to speak loudly. Everyone could hear her.
paragraphs.zh: 她开始大声说话。每个人都能听到她。

paragraphs.en: I had to make sure I did not forget the rules.
paragraphs.zh: 我必须确保我没有忘记规则。

paragraphs.en: He broke the pencil by accident. She felt sorry about it.
paragraphs.zh: 他不小心弄断了铅笔。她为此感到抱歉。

paragraphs.en: I would like to go to sleep now. I am very tired.
paragraphs.zh: 我现在想去睡觉了。我很累。

paragraphs.en: Let me see your drawing. I want to look at it carefully.
paragraphs.zh: 让我看看你的画。我想仔细看看。

paragraphs.en: I have got a new pen. I will keep it in my bag.
paragraphs.zh: 我有了一支新笔。我会把它放在书包里。

paragraphs.en: She left the room and went out to find her friend.
paragraphs.zh: 她离开了房间，出去找她的朋友。

paragraphs.en: My dad has a repair shop. He fixes broken things.
paragraphs.zh: 我爸爸有一个修理店。他修理坏掉的东西。

paragraphs.en: Today, someone brought a broken bicycle to the shop.
paragraphs.zh: 今天，有人带了一辆坏掉的自行车来店里。

paragraphs.en: Dad said: I hope I can fix it. Let me look at it.
paragraphs.zh: 爸爸说：我希望我能修好它。让我看看。

paragraphs.en: He had to lift the bike and turn it upside down.
paragraphs.zh: 他必须把自行车抬起来翻过来。

paragraphs.en: I helped him fetch the tools. We worked together.
paragraphs.zh: 我帮他拿工具。我们一起工作。

paragraphs.en: He asked me to repeat the instructions. I had to remember every step.
paragraphs.zh: 他让我重复说明。我必须记住每一步。

paragraphs.en: We finished the repair and saved the customer a lot of money.
paragraphs.zh: 我们完成了修理，为顾客省了很多钱。

paragraphs.en: I whispered to dad: Can I borrow your tools? He said: Of course!
paragraphs.zh: 我悄悄对爸爸说：我能借你的工具吗？他说：当然！

paragraphs.en: I want to invent something new. Maybe I will improve the design.
paragraphs.zh: 我想发明一些新东西。也许我会改进设计。

paragraphs.en: Dad whistled a happy tune. He loves his job.
paragraphs.zh: 爸爸吹着欢快的口哨。他热爱他的工作。

paragraphs.en: I wished I could stay longer, but I had to hurry home.
paragraphs.zh: 我希望我能待久一点，但我必须赶紧回家。

paragraphs.en: I will visit the shop again tomorrow. I hate to miss a day there.
paragraphs.zh: 我明天会再来店里。我讨厌错过在那里的一天。

paragraphs.en: Today we had an IT lesson at school.
paragraphs.zh: 今天我们在学校上了一节信息技术课。

paragraphs.en: The teacher showed us how to use a tablet.
paragraphs.zh: 老师教我们如何使用平板电脑。

paragraphs.en: We learned how to open and close a file on the computer.
paragraphs.zh: 我们学习了如何在电脑上打开和关闭文件。

paragraphs.en: There was a programme that helped us search for information.
paragraphs.zh: 有一个程序帮助我们搜索信息。

paragraphs.en: We needed wifi to connect to the internet.
paragraphs.zh: 我们需要无线网络来连接互联网。

paragraphs.en: I wrote a story on the computer. The part about the adventure was the best.
paragraphs.zh: 我在电脑上写了一个故事。关于冒险的部分是最好的。

paragraphs.en: The teacher said: Look at the screen and draw a picture.
paragraphs.zh: 老师说：看屏幕，画一幅画。

paragraphs.en: I used the mouse to click and the keyboard to type.
paragraphs.zh: 我用鼠标点击，用键盘打字。

articles.title: The Nature Walk
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: We went on a nature walk through the forest.
paragraphs.zh: 我们在森林里进行了一次自然漫步。

paragraphs.en: I saw a swan swimming in the pond. It was very beautiful.
paragraphs.zh: 我看到一只天鹅在池塘里游泳。非常美丽。

paragraphs.en: A tortoise was walking slowly on the path. An octopus was in the aquarium nearby.
paragraphs.zh: 一只乌龟在小路上慢慢走。附近的水族馆里有一只章鱼。

paragraphs.en: We found a bird's nest in the tree. There were eggs inside.
paragraphs.zh: 我们在树上发现了一个鸟巢。里面有蛋。

paragraphs.en: An insect with colourful wings flew past us.
paragraphs.zh: 一只有着彩色翅膀的昆虫飞过我们身边。

paragraphs.en: The wild animals live in the forest. We should not disturb them.
paragraphs.zh: 野生动物住在森林里。我们不应该打扰它们。

paragraphs.en: We sat on the sand by the sea and watched the waves.
paragraphs.zh: 我们坐在海边的沙滩上看海浪。

paragraphs.en: I found a beautiful shell on the beach. The street back home was quiet.
paragraphs.zh: 我在海滩上找到了一个美丽的贝壳。回家的街道很安静。

paragraphs.en: The water in the stream was clear. The Earth is a beautiful planet.
paragraphs.zh: 小溪里的水很清澈。地球是一个美丽的星球。

paragraphs.en: We saw a pyramid in a book about the desert. The ocean is so big!
paragraphs.zh: 我们在一本关于沙漠的书里看到了金字塔。海洋好大！

paragraphs.en: Today is costume day at school. We do not wear our uniform.
paragraphs.zh: 今天是学校的变装日。我们不穿校服。

paragraphs.en: I wear my cool sunglasses and new trainers.
paragraphs.zh: 我戴上酷酷的太阳镜，穿上新运动鞋。

paragraphs.en: My friend wears pajamas and carries an umbrella. How funny!
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友穿着睡衣，拿着一把雨伞。多有趣！

paragraphs.en: She has a beautiful ring on her finger.
paragraphs.zh: 她手指上戴着一枚漂亮的戒指。

paragraphs.en: If you want, you can dress up as anything!
paragraphs.zh: 如果你想的话，你可以打扮成任何东西！

paragraphs.en: Go away, rain! We want to play outside!
paragraphs.zh: 走开，雨！我们想在外面玩！

paragraphs.en: In a minute, the show will start. You're welcome to join us!
paragraphs.zh: 马上表演就要开始了。欢迎你加入我们！

paragraphs.en: The teacher said: Fantastic! Everyone looks wonderful today.
paragraphs.zh: 老师说：太棒了！今天每个人看起来都很棒。

articles.title: The Jobs Fair
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Our school had a jobs fair. Many people came to talk about their work.
paragraphs.zh: 我们学校举办了一场职业博览会。很多人来谈论他们的工作。

paragraphs.en: The actor told us about working on stage. The artist showed us her paintings.
paragraphs.zh: 演员告诉我们在舞台上工作的事。艺术家给我们看了她的画。

paragraphs.en: The astronaut talked about going to space in a rocket.
paragraphs.zh: 宇航员谈到了乘火箭去太空。

paragraphs.en: A businessman told us about his business. The manager runs a big office.
paragraphs.zh: 一位商人告诉我们他的生意。经理管理一个大办公室。

paragraphs.en: The designer showed us her latest design. The engineer built a model.
paragraphs.zh: 设计师给我们看了她最新的设计。工程师搭建了一个模型。

paragraphs.en: The firefighter drove a fire engine. The pilot flew a plane.
paragraphs.zh: 消防员开消防车。飞行员开飞机。

paragraphs.en: The journalist wrote for a newspaper. The photographer took photos.
paragraphs.zh: 记者为报纸写稿。摄影师拍照。

paragraphs.en: The mechanic fixed cars. The police officer kept people safe.
paragraphs.zh: 机械师修理汽车。警察保护人们的安全。

paragraphs.en: The singer sang a beautiful song. The waiter served food at the meeting.
paragraphs.zh: 歌手唱了一首美丽的歌。服务员在会议上端食物。

paragraphs.en: The queen visited our school! She arrived in a big car.
paragraphs.zh: 女王参观了我们的学校！她坐着一辆大车到达。

paragraphs.en: I really like adventures. Today I went on a very special one.
paragraphs.zh: 我真的很喜欢冒险。今天我进行了一次非常特别的冒险。

paragraphs.en: I woke up early and said yes to the trip. Not everyone wanted to go.
paragraphs.zh: 我早早醒来，对旅行说了好。不是每个人都想去。

paragraphs.en: We went home first, then came back here to start.
paragraphs.zh: 我们先回家，然后回到这里出发。

paragraphs.en: I had a lot of things to carry. There were lots of bags too.
paragraphs.zh: 我有很多东西要拿。也有很多包。

paragraphs.en: We walked fast and hard. Soon we were far from the city.
paragraphs.zh: 我们走得又快又辛苦。很快我们就离城市很远了。

paragraphs.en: I said: Perhaps we should rest. My friend said: Not yet!
paragraphs.zh: 我说：也许我们应该休息。我的朋友说：还没有！

paragraphs.en: We were quite tired but still happy. We walked straight on.
paragraphs.zh: 我们相当累但仍然开心。我们一直往前走。

paragraphs.en: Suddenly, we found a beautiful lake. We had never been there before.
paragraphs.zh: 突然，我们发现了一个美丽的湖。我们以前从未去过那里。

paragraphs.en: We will come again tomorrow. Tonight we rest. Now I go to sleep.
paragraphs.zh: 我们明天再来。今晚我们休息。现在我去睡觉。

paragraphs.en: I usually go on adventures by myself, but today I went together with friends.
paragraphs.zh: 我通常独自去冒险，但今天我和朋友们一起去了。

paragraphs.en: I already feel much better. I also want to go somewhere else next time.
paragraphs.zh: 我已经感觉好多了。我下次还想去别的地方。

paragraphs.en: It was just a little walk, but it felt like a big adventure. Once is not enough!
paragraphs.zh: 这只是一次小小的散步，但感觉像一次大冒险。一次是不够的！

paragraphs.en: I looked everywhere but found nowhere to sit. So I sat over there instead.
paragraphs.zh: 我到处看但找不到地方坐。所以我改坐在那边。

paragraphs.en: How long did the trip take? Actually, not very long at all.
paragraphs.zh: 旅行花了多长时间？实际上，一点也不长。

paragraphs.en: I can go anywhere I want. At the moment, I am happy right here.
paragraphs.zh: 我可以去任何我想去的地方。此刻，我就在这里很开心。

paragraphs.en: It happened a long time ago, but I still remember it. Later, I will write about it.
paragraphs.zh: 这发生在很久以前，但我仍然记得。之后，我会写下来。

paragraphs.en: I said no to staying home today. I am so glad I went out.
paragraphs.zh: 我今天拒绝了待在家里。我很高兴我出去了。

paragraphs.en: I will go away soon and come back after lunch.
paragraphs.zh: 我很快就要走了，午饭后回来。

articles.title: The Snowball Fight
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: It was a cold winter day. We decided to have a snowball fight.
paragraphs.zh: 这是一个寒冷的冬天。我们决定打雪仗。

paragraphs.en: First, we built a snowman in the garden. He had a big smile.
paragraphs.zh: 首先，我们在花园里堆了一个雪人。他有一个大大的微笑。

paragraphs.en: My friend brought a sledge. We went sledging down the hill.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友带了一个雪橇。我们从山上滑雪橇下来。

paragraphs.en: Some kids went skiing. Others tried snowboarding.
paragraphs.zh: 一些孩子去滑雪了。其他人尝试了单板滑雪。

paragraphs.en: We played golf in the snow — just for fun!
paragraphs.zh: 我们在雪地里打高尔夫——只是为了好玩！

paragraphs.en: I brought my suitcase with warm clothes. My friend had a swing in his garden.
paragraphs.zh: 我带了装满暖和衣服的行李箱。我的朋友花园里有一个秋千。

paragraphs.en: We used a torch to find our way home in the dark.
paragraphs.zh: 我们用手电筒在黑暗中找到回家的路。

paragraphs.en: The tyre of my bike was flat. I had to walk home.
paragraphs.zh: 我自行车的轮胎瘪了。我只好走路回家。

paragraphs.en: We joined a volleyball game at the sports centre.
paragraphs.zh: 我们在体育中心参加了一场排球比赛。

articles.title: The Concert Night
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Last night, we went to a concert in the city.
paragraphs.zh: 昨晚，我们去城里看了一场音乐会。

paragraphs.en: The band played rock music and pop music. Everyone danced.
paragraphs.zh: 乐队演奏了摇滚乐和流行乐。每个人都跳舞了。

paragraphs.en: I got an invitation from my friend. She is a member of the fan club.
paragraphs.zh: 我收到了朋友的邀请。她是粉丝俱乐部的成员。

paragraphs.en: We met at the entrance and found our seats.
paragraphs.zh: 我们在入口处见面，找到了我们的座位。

paragraphs.en: The festival was amazing. There was an instrument display too.
paragraphs.zh: 音乐节太棒了。还有乐器展示。

paragraphs.en: After the concert, we took a lift to the top floor.
paragraphs.zh: 音乐会结束后，我们坐电梯到了顶楼。

paragraphs.en: We could see the fire in the distance and the water of the river.
paragraphs.zh: 我们能看到远处的火光和河水。

paragraphs.en: The journey home was long. We took a taxi.
paragraphs.zh: 回家的路很长。我们坐了出租车。

paragraphs.en: I bounced with excitement all the way home. What a night!
paragraphs.zh: 我一路上兴奋地蹦蹦跳跳。多么美好的夜晚！

articles.title: The Time Machine
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: I read a story about a time machine. It could travel to the future.
paragraphs.zh: 我读了一个关于时间机器的故事。它能穿越到未来。

paragraphs.en: The clock showed midnight. It was exactly twelve p.m.
paragraphs.zh: 时钟显示午夜。正好是晚上十二点。

paragraphs.en: At midday, the machine started. It took about a quarter of an hour.
paragraphs.zh: 中午，机器启动了。大约花了一刻钟。

paragraphs.en: In one minute, we were in a new century. Time passed quickly.
paragraphs.zh: 一分钟内，我们到了一个新世纪。时间过得很快。

paragraphs.en: In the future, there were aliens and monsters everywhere.
paragraphs.zh: 在未来，到处都是外星人和怪物。

paragraphs.en: We saw a skateboarding robot playing soccer with a ball.
paragraphs.zh: 我们看到一个滑板机器人在踢足球。

paragraphs.en: People flew in helicopters and drove flying cars.
paragraphs.zh: 人们坐直升机飞行，开飞行汽车。

paragraphs.en: I took a photo and watched the scene on my watch.
paragraphs.zh: 我拍了一张照片，在手表上看着这个场景。

paragraphs.en: We had to go back before the end of the day.
paragraphs.zh: 我们必须在一天结束前回去。

paragraphs.en: It was half past three when we returned. What an adventure!
paragraphs.zh: 我们回来时是三点半。多么精彩的冒险！

articles.title: The Treasure Island
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: We found a map that led to a treasure on an island.
paragraphs.zh: 我们找到了一张通往岛上宝藏的地图。

paragraphs.en: The island was big and full of trees. The path was long.
paragraphs.zh: 岛很大，到处是树。路很长。

paragraphs.en: We had to be brave. The forest was dark and noisy.
paragraphs.zh: 我们必须勇敢。森林又暗又吵。

paragraphs.en: I felt a soft wind on my face. The ground was hard and dry.
paragraphs.zh: 我感到脸上有一阵柔和的风。地面又硬又干。

paragraphs.en: The treasure was in a high place. We had to climb a low wall first.
paragraphs.zh: 宝藏在一个高处。我们必须先爬过一堵矮墙。

paragraphs.en: My friend was short but strong. She helped me climb.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友个子矮但很强壮。她帮我爬上去。

paragraphs.en: The box was heavy and large. Inside were old coins.
paragraphs.zh: 箱子又重又大。里面是古老的硬币。

paragraphs.en: We were so happy! It was a new and exciting discovery.
paragraphs.zh: 我们太开心了！这是一个新的、令人兴奋的发现。

paragraphs.en: The small hole in the ground led to a secret room.
paragraphs.zh: 地上的小洞通向一个秘密房间。

paragraphs.en: I felt sore from all the walking, but it was worth it.
paragraphs.zh: 走了这么多路我感觉酸痛，但值得。

paragraphs.en: I like to write letters to my pen pal. She lives far away.
paragraphs.zh: 我喜欢给笔友写信。她住得很远。

paragraphs.en: I told her: I have a new pet. She said: That is wonderful!
paragraphs.zh: 我告诉她：我有了一只新宠物。她说：太好了！

paragraphs.en: She asked me to post the letter. I put a stamp on the envelope.
paragraphs.zh: 她让我寄信。我在信封上贴了邮票。

paragraphs.en: I had to spend time writing carefully. I did not want to make a mistake.
paragraphs.zh: 我必须花时间仔细写。我不想犯错。

paragraphs.en: She told me she could sell her old books. I wanted to buy them.
paragraphs.zh: 她告诉我她可以卖掉旧书。我想买。

paragraphs.en: I burned my finger while cooking. She said: Be careful!
paragraphs.zh: 我做饭时烫了手指。她说：小心！

paragraphs.en: She appeared at my door one day. I was so surprised!
paragraphs.zh: 有一天她出现在我家门口。我太惊讶了！

paragraphs.en: She said: I believe we will be friends forever.
paragraphs.zh: 她说：我相信我们会永远是朋友。

paragraphs.en: I took her to explore the city. We cycled around the park.
paragraphs.zh: 我带她去探索城市。我们在公园里骑车。

paragraphs.en: She chatted with everyone. She did not mind the rain.
paragraphs.zh: 她和每个人聊天。她不介意下雨。

paragraphs.en: I looked after her during the visit. We stayed together all week.
paragraphs.zh: 我在她来访期间照顾她。我们整周都在一起。

paragraphs.en: She disappeared on the last day. Then I found her at the bus stop!
paragraphs.zh: 最后一天她消失了。然后我在公交站找到了她！

paragraphs.en: She said: I will win a competition one day. I said: I am sure you will!
paragraphs.zh: 她说：我总有一天会赢得比赛。我说：我相信你会的！

paragraphs.en: We are making our home look new. Mum bought some soap and a telephone.
paragraphs.zh: 我们正在让家焕然一新。妈妈买了一些肥皂和一部电话。

paragraphs.en: I walked up the steps to the second floor.
paragraphs.zh: 我走上台阶到了二楼。

paragraphs.en: There is a swing in the garden for my little sister.
paragraphs.zh: 花园里有一个给我小妹妹的秋千。

paragraphs.en: I put wool blankets on every bed. They are warm and soft.
paragraphs.zh: 我在每张床上放了羊毛毯子。它们又暖和又柔软。

paragraphs.en: The stamp collection is on the shelf. The letter is on the table.
paragraphs.zh: 邮票收藏在架子上。信在桌上。

paragraphs.en: I used a brush to paint the wall. The colour is light blue.
paragraphs.zh: 我用刷子刷墙。颜色是浅蓝色。

paragraphs.en: The thing I like most is the new painting in the hall.
paragraphs.zh: 我最喜欢的东西是走廊里的新画。

paragraphs.en: I made a bit of a mess, but it was fun.
paragraphs.zh: 我弄得有点乱，但很有趣。

paragraphs.en: It was my birthday party at the supermarket cafe.
paragraphs.zh: 我的生日派对在超市的咖啡厅举行。

paragraphs.en: My friend is called Jane. She has blond hair and a fair face.
paragraphs.zh: 我的朋友叫简。她有金色的头发和白皙的脸。

paragraphs.en: She could skate very well. She would always win the race.
paragraphs.zh: 她滑冰滑得很好。她总是赢得比赛。

paragraphs.en: I must get off the bus at the city centre. Then I take a taxi.
paragraphs.zh: 我必须在市中心下车。然后坐出租车。

paragraphs.en: The terrible weather made us stay inside. It was another rainy day.
paragraphs.zh: 糟糕的天气让我们待在室内。又是一个下雨天。

paragraphs.en: Shall we go fishing? Any place is fine with me.
paragraphs.zh: 我们去钓鱼好吗？任何地方都行。

paragraphs.en: I have to dress up for the party. I mean, it is a special day!
paragraphs.zh: 我必须为派对打扮。我的意思是，这是特别的一天！

paragraphs.en: At three o'clock, we sat in a circle and played games.
paragraphs.zh: 三点钟，我们围成一圈玩游戏。

paragraphs.en: Then we had a break. I watered the flowers in the garden.
paragraphs.zh: 然后我们休息了一下。我给花园里的花浇了水。

paragraphs.en: The president of our class gave a speech. Brilliant!
paragraphs.zh: 我们班长发表了讲话。太棒了！

paragraphs.en: Most people had fun. What is your age? I am ten years old.
paragraphs.zh: 大多数人都玩得很开心。你多大了？我十岁了。

paragraphs.en: It was better than last year. I have many happy memories.
paragraphs.zh: 比去年好。我有很多快乐的回忆。

paragraphs.en: I took many photos on my phone.
paragraphs.zh: 我用手机拍了很多照片。

articles.title: The Sports Day
topics: Sports & leisure (Continued)（运动与休闲 续）

paragraphs.en: Today is Sports Day. We play many sports at school.
paragraphs.zh: 今天是运动日。我们在学校做很多运动。

paragraphs.en: I hit the ball with a bat. Then I jumped over the line.
paragraphs.zh: 我用球棒击球。然后我跳过了线。

paragraphs.en: We went fishing by the river. I kicked the ball and scored a goal.
paragraphs.zh: 我们去河边钓鱼了。我踢球进了一个球。

paragraphs.en: I crossed the finish line first. I learned to never give up.
paragraphs.zh: 我第一个冲过终点线。我学会了永不放弃。

paragraphs.en: The alphabet of sports: A for athletics, B for basketball.
paragraphs.zh: 运动的字母表：A代表田径，B代表篮球。

paragraphs.en: I asked my friend: Do you understand the rules?
paragraphs.zh: 我问朋友：你理解规则吗？

paragraphs.en: London is a great city for sports. It is about 100 kilometres away.
paragraphs.zh: 伦敦是一个很棒的运动城市。它大约在100公里外。

paragraphs.en: The middle of the field is where we start. Go!
paragraphs.zh: 场地中间是我们出发的地方。走！

paragraphs.en: My world is colourful. I see black cats and blue skies.
paragraphs.zh: 我的世界是多彩的。我看到黑猫和蓝天。

paragraphs.en: The brown dog plays with the white rabbit.
paragraphs.zh: 棕色的狗和白色的兔子一起玩。

paragraphs.en: My sister wears a pink dress and yellow shoes.
paragraphs.zh: 我姐姐穿着粉色连衣裙和黄色鞋子。

paragraphs.en: The old man has a gray beard. The young girl has red hair.
paragraphs.zh: 老人有灰色的胡子。年轻女孩有红色的头发。

paragraphs.en: The orange sunset is beautiful. Everything looks cool.
paragraphs.zh: 橙色的日落很美。一切看起来很酷。

paragraphs.en: My dear friend, you look excellent today!
paragraphs.zh: 亲爱的朋友，你今天看起来棒极了！

paragraphs.en: The furry cat is strange but cute. It has a double tail!
paragraphs.zh: 毛茸茸的猫很奇怪但很可爱。它有两条尾巴！

paragraphs.en: I have several books. OK, let me count them.
paragraphs.zh: 我有好几本书。好的，让我数数。

paragraphs.en: The door is closed. The room is quiet.
paragraphs.zh: 门关着。房间很安静。

paragraphs.en: Let us play a guessing game. Can you guess what I am thinking?
paragraphs.zh: 我们来玩猜谜游戏。你能猜到我在想什么吗？

paragraphs.en: I will act like an animal. You have to guess which one.
paragraphs.zh: 我会表演一种动物。你必须猜是哪一种。

paragraphs.en: What happened? The lights went off! It was zero visibility.
paragraphs.zh: 发生了什么？灯灭了！能见度为零。

paragraphs.en: I prefer to play outside. I use my hands to make shapes.
paragraphs.zh: 我更喜欢在外面玩。我用手做形状。

paragraphs.en: I do my best every day. I am a good student.
paragraphs.zh: 我每天都尽力。我是一个好学生。

paragraphs.en: I lie on the grass and look at the clouds.
paragraphs.zh: 我躺在草地上看云。

paragraphs.en: I make a cake and take it to school.
paragraphs.zh: 我做了一个蛋糕带到学校。

paragraphs.en: I win the game! Everyone claps and cheers.
paragraphs.zh: 我赢了游戏！每个人都鼓掌欢呼。

paragraphs.en: How are you today? I am fine, thank you.
paragraphs.zh: 你今天怎么样？我很好，谢谢。

paragraphs.en: How many books do you have? How old are you?
paragraphs.zh: 你有多少本书？你多大了？

paragraphs.en: What is your name? Where do you live?
paragraphs.zh: 你叫什么名字？你住在哪里？

paragraphs.en: Which colour do you like? Who is your best friend?
paragraphs.zh: 你喜欢哪种颜色？谁是你最好的朋友？

paragraphs.en: Whose bag is this? Pardon? I did not hear you.
paragraphs.zh: 这是谁的包？什么？我没听到你说的。

paragraphs.en: Have you ever been to London? Of course I have!
paragraphs.zh: 你去过伦敦吗？我当然去过！

paragraphs.en: Can you do it by yourself? I can try!
paragraphs.zh: 你能自己做吗？我可以试试！

paragraphs.en: I like this book too. It is as good as the other one.
paragraphs.zh: 我也喜欢这本书。它和另一本一样好。
